pali: 4 . Bhagavato brahmacāripañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 4. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, buddho brahmacārī’’ ti?
chinese: 是否那頭象偶爾吼叫鷺的吼聲呢？

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, bhagavā brahmacārī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhante nāgasena, buddho brahmuno sisso’’ ti?
chinese: 這確實不是。

pali: ‘‘ Atthi pana te, mahārāja, hatthipāmokkho’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，梵天是有覺者、非覺者？

pali: ‘‘ Atthi , bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃnu kho, mahārāja, so hatthī kadāci karahaci koñcanādaṃ nadatīti?
chinese: 那樣的話，梵天是世尊的弟子。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, nadatī’’ ti‘‘ tena hi, mahārāja, so hatthī koñcasakuṇassa sisso’’ ti?
chinese: 世尊梵行的問題第四。

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 5.世尊之具足戒的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ pana, mahārāja, brahmā sabuddhiko abuddhiko’’ ti?
chinese: 受具足戒是優良的？

pali: ‘‘ Sabuddhiko, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 」「是的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, brahmā bhagavato sisso’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 那麼，有佛陀的受具足戒，或者沒有？

pali: Bhagavato brahmacāripañho catuttho.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 5 . Bhagavato upasampadāpañho
5. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, upasampadā sundarā’’ ti?
chinese: 世尊在菩提樹下與一切知的狀態智一起成為已具足者，不被其他人授與受具足戒，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, upasampadā sundarā’’ ti.
chinese: 如世尊對弟子安立終生不應該被越過的學處。

pali: ‘‘ Atthi pana, bhante, buddhassa upasampadā, udāhu natthī’’ ti?

‘‘ Upasampanno kho, mahārāja , bhagavā bodhirukkhamūle saha sabbaññutañāṇena, natthi bhagavato upasampadā aññehi dinnā, yathā sāvakānaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavā sikkhāpadaṃ paññapeti yāvajīvaṃ anatikkamanīyan’’ ti.
chinese: 凡以母親之死哭泣者，以及凡以法之情愛哭泣者，那兩個哭泣者中，誰的淚是藥，誰的淚不是藥？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Bhagavato upasampadāpañho pañcamo.
6 . Assubhesajjābhesajjapañho
chinese: 一個的淚以貪、瞋、癡成為有垢的、熱的，一個的淚以喜、喜悅成為離垢的、清涼的。

pali: 6. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, yo ca mātari matāya rodati, yo ca dhammapemena rodati, ubhinnaṃ tesaṃ rodantānaṃ kassa assu bhesajjaṃ, kassa na bhesajjan’’ ti?
‘‘ Ekassa kho, mahārāja, assu rāgadosamohehi samalaṃ uṇhaṃ, ekassa pītisomanassena vimalaṃ sītalaṃ.
chinese: 7.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: Yaṃ kho, mahārāja, sītalaṃ, taṃ bhesajjaṃ, yaṃ uṇhaṃ, taṃ na bhesajjan’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 一個是取著者，一個是無取著者。

pali: Assubhesajjābhesajjapañho chaṭṭho.
chinese: 這所謂的取著者、無取著者是什麼？

pali: 7 . Sarāgavītarāganānākaraṇapañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 7. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kiṃ nānākaraṇaṃ sarāgassa ca vītarāgassa cā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Eko kho, mahārāja, ajjhosito, eko anajjhosito’’ ti.
chinese: 我認為像這樣：凡有貪者與凡離貪者，所有人都適用：他只想要美善的硬食或軟食，任何人都不想要惡的。

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ etaṃ, bhante, ajjhosito anajjhosito nāmā’’ ti?
‘‘ Eko kho, mahārāja, atthiko, eko anatthiko’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Passāmahaṃ, bhante, evarūpaṃ yo ca sarāgo, yo ca vītarāgo, sabbopeso sobhanaṃ yeva icchati khādanīyaṃ vā bhojanīyaṃ vā, na koci pāpakaṃ icchatī’’ ti.
‘‘ Avītarāgo kho, mahārāja, rasapaṭisaṃvedī ca rasarāgapaṭisaṃvedī ca bhojanaṃ bhuñjati, vītarāgo pana rasapaṭisaṃvedī bhojanaṃ bhuñjati, no ca kho rasarāgapaṭisaṃvedī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi , bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Sarāgavītarāganānākaraṇapañho sattamo.
chinese: 不在某處。

pali: 8 . Paññāpatiṭṭhānapañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 8. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, paññā kuhiṃ paṭivasatī’’ ti?
‘‘ Na katthaci mahārājā’’ ti.
chinese: 慧之住立的問題第八。

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhante nāgasena, natthi paññā’’ ti.
chinese: 9.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Vāto, mahārāja, kuhiṃ paṭivasatī’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，凡你這樣說：『輪迴。

pali: ‘‘ Na katthaci bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 』那個輪迴是什麼？

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, natthi vāto’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 就是在這裡生者死了，在這裡死者出生在他處；

pali: Paññāpatiṭṭhānapañho aṭṭhamo.
9 . Saṃsārapañho
chinese: 在那裡生者就在那裡死了，在那裡死者出生在他處。

pali: 9. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, yaṃ panetaṃ brūsi‘ saṃsāro’ ti, katamo so saṃsāro’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Idha, mahārāja, jāto idheva marati, idha mato aññatra uppajjati, tahiṃ jāto tahiṃ yeva marati, tahiṃ mato aññatra uppajjati, evaṃ kho, mahārāja, saṃsāro hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 如有男子吃熟芒果後種植種子，從那裡，大芒果樹產生後會給與果實，那時，那位男子又從那裡吃熟芒果後種植種子，從那裡，大芒果樹又產生後會給與果實，這樣，這樹的邊際不被安立。

pali: ‘‘ Opammaṃ karohī’’ ti.

‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, kocideva puriso pakkaṃ ambaṃ khāditvā aṭṭhiṃ ropeyya, tato mahanto ambarukkho nibbattitvā phalāni dadeyya, atha so puriso tatopi pakkaṃ ambaṃ khāditvā aṭṭhiṃ ropeyya, tatopi mahanto ambarukkho nibbattitvā phalāni dadeyya, evametesaṃ rukkhānaṃ koṭi na paññāyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, idha jāto idheva marati, idha mato aññatra uppajjati, tahiṃ jāto tahiṃ yeva marati, tahiṃ mato aññatra uppajjati, evaṃ kho, mahārāja, saṃsāro hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Saṃsārapañho navamo.
10 . Cirakatasaraṇapañho
chinese: 是否你記得某些應該被作的做了後被忘記了呢？

pali: 10. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kena atītaṃ cirakataṃ saratī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Satiyā, mahārājā’’ ti.
chinese: 是否你在那時是無心者呢？

pali: ‘‘ Nanu, bhante nāgasena, cittena sarati no satiyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Abhijānāsi nu, tvaṃ mahārāja, kiñcideva karaṇīyaṃ katvā pamuṭṭhan’’ ti?
‘‘ Āma bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ nu kho, tvaṃ mahārāja, tasmiṃ samaye acittako ahosī’’ ti?
chinese: 長久所作憶念的問題第十。

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, sati tasmiṃ samaye nāhosī’’ ti.
chinese: 11.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Atha kasmā, tvaṃ mahārāja, evamāha‘ cittena sarati, no satiyā’’’ ti?
chinese: 一切念生起『記憶』，或者，念只有外在的幫助？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Cirakatasaraṇapañho dasamo.
chinese: 念有『記憶』，也有外在的幫助。

pali: 11 . Abhijānantasatipañho
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: 11. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, sabbā sati abhijānantī uppajjati , udāhu kaṭumikāva satī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Abhijānantīpi, mahārāja, kaṭumikāpi satī’’ ti.
chinese: 如果念沒有依外在的幫助，則對工匠，沒有任何應該被業處，或技能處(工藝)，或明處(學術)作的，老師是無益的。

pali: ‘‘ Evañhi kho, bhante nāgasena, sabbā sati abhijānantī, natthi kaṭumikā satī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yadi natthi, mahārāja, kaṭumikā sati, natthi kiñci sippikānaṃ kammāyatanehi vā sippāyatanehi vā vijjāṭṭhānehi vā karaṇīyaṃ, niratthakā ācariyā, yasmā ca kho, mahārāja, atthi kaṭumikā sati, tasmā atthi kammāyatanehi vā sippāyatanehi vā vijjāṭṭhānehi vā karaṇīyaṃ, attho ca ācariyehī’’ ti.
chinese: 念品第六。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 在這品中有十一個問題。

pali: Abhijānantasatipañho ekādasamo.
Sativaggo chaṭṭho.
Imasmiṃ vagge ekādasa pañhā.
7 . Arūpadhammavavattanavaggo
chinese: 7.無色法區別品 [目錄]

pali: 1 . Satiuppajjanapañho
chinese: 1.念之生起的問題

pali: 1. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, katihākārehi sati uppajjatī’’ ti?
chinese: 念從幾種方式生起？

pali: ‘‘ Sattarasahākārehi, mahārāja, sati uppajjatī’’ ti.
chinese: 念從十七幾種方式生起。

pali: ‘‘ Katamehi sattarasahākārehī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「從哪十七幾種方式？

pali: ‘‘ Abhijānatopi, mahārāja, sati uppajjati, kaṭumikāyapi sati uppajjati, oḷārikaviññāṇatopi sati uppajjati, hitaviññāṇatopi sati uppajjati, ahitaviññāṇatopi sati uppajjati, sabhāganimittatopi sati uppajjati, visabhāganimittatopi sati uppajjati, kathābhiññāṇatopi sati uppajjati, lakkhaṇatopi sati uppajjati, sāraṇatopi sati uppajjati, muddātopi sati uppajjati, gaṇanātopi sati uppajjati, dhāraṇatopi sati uppajjati, bhāvanatopi sati uppajjati, potthakanibandhanatopi sati uppajjati, upanikkhepatopi sati uppajjati, anubhūtatopi sati uppajjatīti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ abhijānato sati uppajjati?
Yathā, mahārāja, āyasmā ca ānando khujjuttarā ca upāsikā, ye vā pana aññepi keci jātissarā jātiṃ saranti, evaṃ abhijānato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從外在的幫助生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ kaṭumikāya sati uppajjati?
chinese: 凡本來是念已忘失者，而其他人為了使之記得敦促他，這樣是念從外在的幫助生起。

pali: Yo pakatiyā muṭṭhassatiko, pare ca taṃ sarāpanatthaṃ nibandhanti, evaṃ kaṭumikāya sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從粗大識生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ oḷārikaviññāṇato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 當在王位上被灌頂，或須陀洹果被達到時，這樣是念從粗大識生起。

pali: Yadā rajje vā abhisitto hoti, sotāpattiphalaṃ vā patto hoti, evaṃ oḷārikaviññāṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從有利益的識生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ hitaviññāṇato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 凡在該處有使意識到樂的者，他記得『在那樣之處有這樣使意識到樂的。

pali: Yamhi sukhāpito,‘ amukasmiṃ evaṃ sukhāpito’ ti sarati, evaṃ hitaviññāṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從無利益的識生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ ahitaviññāṇato sati uppajjati?
Yamhi dukkhāpito,‘ amukasmiṃ evaṃ dukkhāpito’ ti sarati, evaṃ ahitaviññāṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 』這樣是念從無利益的識生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ sabhāganimittato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 怎樣是念從相似相生起呢？

pali: Sadisaṃ puggalaṃ disvā mātaraṃ vā pitaraṃ vā bhātaraṃ vā bhaginiṃ vā sarati, oṭṭhaṃ vā goṇaṃ vā gadrabhaṃ vā disvā aññaṃ tādisaṃ oṭṭhaṃ vā goṇaṃ vā gadrabhaṃ vā sarati, evaṃ sabhāganimittato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 看見駱駝，或牛，或驢子後，他記得像那樣的駱駝，或牛，或驢子，這樣是念從相似相生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ visabhāganimattato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 怎樣是念從無相似相生起呢？

pali: Asukassa nāma vaṇṇo ediso, saddo ediso, gandho ediso, raso ediso, phoṭṭhabbo edisoti sarati, evampi visabhāganimittatopi ṃsati uppajjati.
chinese: 味道是像這樣的；

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ kathābhiññāṇato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 』這樣是念從無相似相生起。

pali: Yo pakatiyā muṭṭhassatiko hoti, taṃ pare sarāpenti, tena so sarati, evaṃ kathābhiññāṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 凡本來是念已忘失者，其他人使他記得，因為那樣，他記得，這樣是念從交談特徵生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ lakkhaṇato sati uppajjati?
Yo pakatiyā balībaddānaṃ aṅgena jānāti, lakkhaṇena jānāti, evaṃ lakkhaṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 凡本來對牛以標記知道、以相知道者，這樣是念從相生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ sāraṇato sati uppajjati?
Yo pakatiyā muṭṭhassatiko hoti, yo taṃ‘ sarāhi bho, sarāhi bho’ ti punappunaṃ sarāpeti, evaṃ sāraṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 請你記得，先生！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ muddāto sati uppajjati?
chinese: 』樣是念從提醒生起。

pali: Lipiyā sikkhitattā jānāti‘ imassa akkharassa anantaraṃ imaṃ akkharaṃ kātabban’ ti evaṃ muddāto sati uppajjati.
chinese: 從文字學得的情況知道：『對這個字母，這[下一]個字母應該隨即被帶入。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ gaṇanāto sati uppajjati?
Gaṇanāya sikkhitattā gaṇakā bahumpi gaṇenti, evaṃ gaṇanāto sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從計算生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ dhāraṇato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 從計算學得的情況，許多計算家計算，這樣是念從計算生起。

pali: Dhāraṇāya sikkhitattā dhāraṇakā bahumpi dhārenti , evaṃ dhāraṇato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從受持生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ bhāvanāto sati uppajjati?
chinese: 從受持學得的情況，許多受持(持～)者憶持，這樣是念從受持生起。

pali: Idha bhikkhu anekavihitaṃ pubbenivāsaṃ anussarati, seyyathīdaṃ, ekampi jātiṃ dvepi jātiyo… pe… iti sākāraṃ sauddesaṃ pubbenivāsaṃ anussarati, evaṃ bhāvanāto sati uppajjati.
chinese: 這裡，比丘回憶起許多前世住處，即：一生、二生……（中略）像這樣，他回憶起前世住處有這樣的行相與境遇，這樣是念從修習生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ potthakanibandhanato sati uppajjati?
Rājāno anusāsaniyaṃ assarantā[ anussarantā( sabbattha)] etaṃ potthakaṃ āharathāti, tena potthakena anussaranti, evaṃ potthakanibandhanato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 當國王們回憶被教誡的(命令)時，『請你們取這本書冊。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ upanikkhepato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 』他以那本書冊回憶，這樣是念從書冊約束生起。

pali: Upanikkhittaṃ bhaṇḍaṃ disvā sarati, evaṃ upanikkhepato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 怎樣是念從抵押物生起呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ anubhūtato sati uppajjati?
chinese: 看見被抵押的物品後他記得，這樣是念從抵押物生起。

pali: Diṭṭhattā rūpaṃ sarati, sutattā saddaṃ sarati, ghāyitattā gandhaṃ sarati, sāyitattā rasaṃ sarati, phuṭṭhattā phoṭṭhabbaṃ sarati, viññātattā dhammaṃ sarati, evaṃ anubhūtato sati uppajjati.
chinese: 從所嘗的情況他記得味道；

pali: Imehi kho, mahārāja, sattarasahākārehi sati uppajjatī’’ ti.
chinese: 從所識的情況他記得法，這樣是念從所經驗的生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Satiuppajjanapañho paṭhamo.
chinese: 念從十七幾種方式生起。

pali: 2 . Buddhaguṇasatipaṭilābhapañho
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: 2. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, tumhe etaṃ bhaṇatha‘ yo vassasataṃ akusalaṃ kareyya, maraṇakāle ca ekaṃ buddhaguṇaṃ satiṃ paṭilabheyya, so devesu uppajjeyyā’ ti etaṃ na saddahāmi, evañca pana vadetha‘ etena pāṇātipātena niraye uppajjeyyā’ ti etampi na saddahāmī’’ ti.
chinese: 』我不相信此語。

pali: ‘ ‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, khuddakopi pāsāṇo vinā nāvāya udake uppilaveyyā’’ ti .
chinese: 』我也不相信此語。

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ nu kho, mahārāja, vāhasatampi pāsāṇānaṃ nāvāya āropitaṃ udake uppilaveyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, nāvā, evaṃ kusalāni kammāni daṭṭhabbānī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「是的，大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 善業應該被看作如船。

pali: Buddhaguṇasatipaṭilābhapañho dutiyo.
chinese: 你是堪任者。

pali: 3 . Dukkhappahānavāyamapañho
chinese: 佛德念之得到的問題第二。

pali: 3. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kiṃ tumhe atītassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamathā’’ ti?
chinese: 3.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, mahārājā’’ ti.
‘‘ Kiṃ pana, bhante, anāgatassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamathā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, mahārājā’’ ti.
chinese: 那麼，你們為了未來苦的捨斷努力嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ pana paccuppannassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamathā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, mahārājā’’ ti.
chinese: 那麼，你們為了現在苦的捨斷努力嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Yadi tumhe na atītassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamatha, na anāgatassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamatha, na paccuppannassa dukkhassa pahānāya vāyamatha, atha kimatthāya vāyamathā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「如果你們不為了過去苦的捨斷努力，不為了未來苦的捨斷努力，不為了現在苦的捨斷努力，那麼你們為了什麼努力呢？

pali: Thero āha‘ kinti, mahārāja, idañca dukkhaṃ nirujjheyya, aññañca dukkhaṃ nuppajjeyyā’ ti etadatthāya vāyamāmā’’ ti.
chinese: 『是否這個苦會被滅，以及其它苦不會生起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Atthi pana te, bhante nāgasena, anāgataṃ dukkhan’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，對你，未來苦存在？

pali: ‘‘ Natthi[ kathā.828,829 passitabbaṃ], mahārājā’’ ti‘‘ tumhe kho, bhante nāgasena, atipaṇḍitā, ye tumhe asantānaṃ anāgatānaṃ dukkhānaṃ pahānāya vāyamathā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Atthi pana te, mahārāja, keci paṭirājāno paccatthikā paccāmittā paccupaṭṭhitā hontī’’ ti?
chinese: 存在。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, atthī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃnu kho, mahārāja, tadā tumhe parikhaṃ khaṇāpeyyātha, pākāraṃ cināpeyyātha gopuraṃ kārāpeyyātha, aṭṭālakaṃ kārāpeyyātha, dhaññaṃ atiharāpeyyāthā’’ ti?
chinese: 那個就被預先預備。

chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, paṭikacceva taṃ sikkhitaṃ hotī’’ ti.

pali: ‘‘ Kissatthāyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Natthi, bhante’’ ti .

chinese: 你怎麼想：如果當你成為口渴的，那時你使人挖掘水井，使人挖掘水池，使人挖掘池塘：『我將能喝飲用水。

‘‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, yadā tvaṃ pipāsito bhaveyyāsi, tadā tvaṃ udapānaṃ khaṇāpeyyāsi, pokkharaṇiṃ khaṇāpeyyāsi, taḷākaṃ khaṇāpeyyāsi‘ pānīyaṃ pivissāmī’’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, paṭikacceva taṃ paṭiyattaṃ hotī’’ ti.

pali: ‘‘ Kissatthāyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

‘‘ Atthi pana, mahārāja, anāgatā pipāsā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Natthi, bhante’’ ti.

‘ ‘ Bhiyyo opammaṃ karohī’’ ti.

chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, paṭikacceva taṃ paṭiyattaṃ hotī’’ ti.

pali: ‘‘ Tumhe kho, mahārāja, atipaṇḍitā, ye tumhe asantānaṃ anāgatānaṃ bubhukkhānaṃ paṭibāhanatthāya paṭiyādethā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

4 . Brahmalokapañho
chinese: 梵天世界離這裡是遠的：重閣大小的石頭從那裡落下，當以日夜四萬八千由旬落下時，以四個月會住立在地上。

pali: 4. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kīvadūro ito brahmaloko’’ ti?
‘‘ Dūro kho, mahārāja, ito brahmaloko kūṭāgāramattā silā tamhā patitā ahorattena aṭṭhacattālīsayojanasahassāni bhassamānā catūhi māsehi pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhaheyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 同樣的，有神通心達自在的比丘在閻浮提消失，會出現在梵天世界。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, tumhe evaṃ bhaṇatha‘ seyyathāpi balavā puriso samiñjitaṃ vā bāhaṃ pasāreyya , pasāritaṃ vā bāhaṃ samiñjeyya, evameva iddhimā bhikkhu cetovasippatto jambudīpe antarahito brahmaloke pātubhaveyyā’ ti etaṃ vacanaṃ na saddahāmi, evaṃ atisīghaṃ tāva bahūni yojanasatāni gacchissatī’’ ti.
chinese: 約兩百由旬。

pali: Thero āha‘‘ kuhiṃ pana, mahārāja, tava jātabhūmī’’ ti?
chinese: 你是否記得在那裡就某應該被作的作後被記得的呢？

pali: ‘‘ Atthi, bhante, alasando nāma dīpo, tatthāhaṃ jāto’’ ti.
chinese: 」「是的，大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kīva dūro, mahārāja, ito alasando hotī’’ ti?
chinese: 你已疾速地經過約兩百由旬。

pali: ‘‘ Dvimattāni, bhante, yojanasatānī’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Abhijānāsi nu tvaṃ, mahārāja, tattha kiñcideva karaṇīyaṃ karitvā saritā’’ ti?
chinese: 5.二個世界出生間同時性的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, sarāmī’’ ti.
‘‘ Lahuṃ kho tvaṃ, mahārāja, gatosi dvimattāni yojanasatānī’’ ti.
chinese: 5.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.

pali: Brahmalokapañho catuttho.
5 . Dvinnaṃ lokuppannānaṃ samakabhāvapañho
chinese: 誰比較快？

pali: 5. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, yo idha kālaṅkato brahmaloke uppajjeyya, yo ca idha kālaṅkato kasmīre uppajjeyya, ko cirataraṃ ko sīghataran’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Samakaṃ, mahārājā’’ ti.

pali: ‘ ‘ Opammaṃ karohī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Dvimattāni, bhante, yojanasatānī’’ ti.
chinese: 請你想一下(思惟)葛拉西村落。

pali: ‘‘ Kīva dūraṃ, mahārāja, ito kasmīraṃ hotī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Dvādasa, bhante, yojanānī’’ ti.
chinese: 請你想一下迦濕彌羅。

pali: ‘‘ Iṅgha, tvaṃ mahārāja, kalasigāmaṃ cintehī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Cintito, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 所想的哪一個比較慢？

pali: ‘‘ Iṅgha, tvaṃ mahārāja, kasmīraṃ cintehī’’ ti.
chinese: 同時。

pali: ‘‘ Cintitaṃ bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Katamaṃ nu kho, mahārāja, cirena cintitaṃ, katamaṃ sīghataran’’ ti?
chinese: 凡如果在這裡命終者出生在梵天世界，與凡如果在這裡命終者出生在迦濕彌羅，他們就同時出生。

pali: ‘‘ Samakaṃ bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, yo idha kālaṅkato brahmaloke uppajjeyya, yo ca idha kālaṅkato kasmīre uppajjeyya, samakaṃ yeva uppajjantī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhiyyo opammaṃ karohī’’ ti.

‘‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, dve sakuṇā ākāsena gaccheyyuṃ , tesu eko ucce rukkhe nisīdeyya, eko nīce rukkhe nisīdeyya, tesaṃ samakaṃ patiṭṭhitānaṃ katamassa chāyā paṭhamataraṃ pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhaheyya, katamassa chāyā cirena pathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhaheyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Samakaṃ, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 凡如果在這裡命終者出生在梵天世界，與凡如果在這裡命終者出生在迦濕彌羅，他們就同時出生。

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, yo idha kālaṅkato brahmaloke uppajjeyya, yo ca idha kālaṅkato kasmīre uppajjeyya, samakaṃ yeva uppajjantī’’ ti.
chinese: 二個世界出生間同時性的問題第五。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.

pali: Dvinnaṃ lokuppannānaṃ samakabhāvapañho pañcamo.
chinese: 6.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: 6 . Bojjhaṅgapañho
chinese: 有多少覺支呢？

pali: 6. Rājā āha‘‘ kati nu kho, bhante nāgasena, bojjhaṅgā’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，他以多少覺支覺呢？

pali: ‘‘ Satta kho, mahārāja, bojjhaṅgā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Katihi pana, bhante, bojjhaṅgehi bujjhatī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Ekena kho, mahārāja, bojjhaṅgena bujjhati dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Atha kissa nu kho, bhante, vuccanti‘ satta bojjhaṅgā’’’ ti?
chinese: 你怎麼想：刀被放入絹布，未被手拿起，能夠切斷應該被切斷的嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, asi kosiyā pakkhitto aggahito hatthena ussahati chejjaṃ chinditun’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 你是堪任者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 7.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: Bojjhaṅgapañho chaṭṭho.
chinese: 哪個比較多：福德或非福德？

pali: 7 . Pāpapuññānaṃ appānappabhāvapañho
chinese: 福德比較多，非福德僅一點點。

pali: 7. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kataraṃ nu kho bahutaraṃ puññaṃ vā apuññaṃ vā’’ ti?
chinese: 作非福德者是後悔者：『惡業被我做了。

pali: ‘‘ Puññaṃ kho, mahārāja , bahutaraṃ, apuññaṃ thokan’’ ti.
chinese: 』因為那樣，他不增長惡的。

pali: ‘‘ Kena kāraṇenā’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Apuññaṃ kho, mahārāja, karonto vippaṭisārī hoti‘ pāpakammaṃ mayā katan’ ti, tena pāpaṃ na vaḍḍhati.

Puññaṃ kho, mahārāja, karonto avippaṭisārī hoti, avippaṭisārino pāmojjaṃ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṃ vedeti, sukhino cittaṃ samādhiyati, samāhito yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti, tena kāraṇena puññaṃ vaḍḍhati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Puriso kho, mahārāja, chinnahatthapādo bhagavato ekaṃ uppalahatthaṃ datvā ekanavutikappāni vinipātaṃ na gacchissati.
chinese: 惡福德少非少性的問題第七。

pali: Imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena bhaṇāmi‘ puññaṃ bahutaraṃ, apuññaṃ thokan’’’ ti.
chinese: 8.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
Pāpapuññānaṃ appānappabhāvapañho sattamo.
chinese: 凡知道他做惡者，凡不知道他做惡者，誰的非福德比較多？

pali: 8 . Jānantājānantapāpakaraṇapañho
chinese: 」上座說：「大王！

pali: 8. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, yo jānanto pāpakammaṃ karoti, yo ajānanto pāpakammaṃ karoti, kassa bahutaraṃ apuññan’’ ti?
chinese: 那樣的話，凡我的王子或國王大臣不知道他做惡者，我們應該兩倍處罰他？

pali: Thero āha‘‘ yo kho, mahārāja, ajānanto pāpakammaṃ karoti, tassa bahutaraṃ apuññan’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhante nāgasena, yo amhākaṃ rājaputto vā rājamahāmatto vā ajānanto pāpakammaṃ karoti, taṃ mayaṃ diguṇaṃ daṇḍemā’’ ti?
chinese: 你怎麼想：有灼熱的、熾然的、燃燒的、發紅的鐵丸，如果一位知道者拿起，一位不知道者拿起，哪個會比較特別被燒？

pali: ‘‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, tattaṃ ayoguḷaṃ ādittaṃ sampajjalitaṃ sajotibhūtaṃ eko jānanto gaṇheyya, eko ajānanto gaṇheyya, katamo[ kassa( ka.)] balavataraṃ ḍayheyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 你是堪任者。

pali: ‘‘ Yo kho, bhante, ajānanto gaṇheyya, so[ tassa( pī. ka.)] balavataraṃ ḍayheyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 9.去北俱盧洲等的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, yo ajānanto pāpakammaṃ karoti, tassa bahutaraṃ apuññan’’ ti.
chinese: 有任何人可能以這個身體去北俱盧洲，或梵天世界，又或其它島嶼？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
Jānantājānantapāpakaraṇapañho aṭṭhamo.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 9 . Uttarakurukādigamanapañho
chinese: 有人能以這個四大身體去北俱盧洲，或梵天世界，又或其它島嶼。

pali: 9. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, atthi koci, yo iminā sarīrena uttarakuruṃ vā gaccheyya, brahmalokaṃ vā, aññaṃ vā pana dīpan’’ ti?
chinese: 如何能以這個身體去北俱盧洲，或梵天世界，又或其它島嶼？

pali: ‘‘ Atthi, mahārāja, yo iminā cātummahābhūtikena kāyena uttarakuruṃ vā gaccheyya, brahmalokaṃ vā, aññaṃ vā pana dīpan’’ ti.
chinese: 我記得，那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ, bhante nāgasena, iminā cātummahābhūtikena kāyena uttarakuruṃ vā gaccheyya, brahmalokaṃ vā, aññaṃ vā pana dīpan’’ ti?
chinese: 我使心中生起：『我將要從這裡出去。

pali: ‘‘ Abhijānāsi nu, tvaṃ mahārāja, imissā pathaviyā vidatthiṃ vā ratanaṃ vā laṅghitā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, abhijānāmi‘ ahaṃ, bhante nāgasena, aṭṭhapi rataniyo laṅghemī’’’ ti.
chinese: 有神通的比丘是心達自在者，在心上使身登上後，以心的自在行走於天空。

pali: ‘‘ Kathaṃ, tvaṃ mahārāja, aṭṭhapi rataniyo laṅghesī’’ ti?
‘‘ Ahañhi, bhante, cittaṃ uppādemi‘ ettha nipatissāmī’ ti saha cittuppādena kāyo me lahuko hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 10.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, iddhimā bhikkhu cetovasippatto kāyaṃ citte samāropetvā cittavasena vehāsaṃ gacchatī’’ ti.
chinese: 』樹都沒有一百由旬長，那麼，將從哪裡會有一百由旬的長骨？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: Uttarakurukādigamanapañho navamo.
chinese: 你怎麼想：『大海中也有五百由旬的大魚。

pali: 10 . Dīghaṭṭhipañho
chinese: 』被你聽聞嗎？

pali: 10. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, tumhe evaṃ bhaṇatha‘ aṭṭhikāni dīghāni yojanasatikānipī’ ti, rukkhopi tāva natthi yojanasatiko, kuto pana aṭṭhikāni dīghāni yojanasatikāni bhavissantī’’ ti?
chinese: 長骨的問題第十。

pali: ‘ ‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, sutaṃ te‘ mahāsamudde pañcayojanasatikāpi macchā atthī’’’ ti?
chinese: 11.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, sutan’’ ti.
chinese: 你們這麼說：能使呼吸(出息入息)滅？

pali: ‘‘ Nanu mahārāja, pañcayojanasatikassa macchassa aṭṭhikāni dīghāni bhavissanti yojanasatikānipī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi , bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 你怎麼想：是否之前打鼾被你聽聞？

pali: Dīghaṭṭhipañho dasamo.
chinese: 」「是的，大德！

pali: 11 . Assāsapassāsanirodhapañho
chinese: 之前已聽聞。

pali: 11. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, tumhe evaṃ bhaṇatha‘ sakkā assāsapassāse nirodhetun’’’ ti?
chinese: 會停止。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, sakkā assāsapassāse nirodhetun’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Kathaṃ, bhante nāgasena, sakkā assāsapassāse nirodhetun’’ ti.
‘‘ Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, sutapubbo te koci kākacchamāno’’ ti.
chinese: 身未被修習、戒未被修習、心未被修習、慧未被修習者的那個聲音確實在身體彎曲時將會停止，那麼，為何身已被修習、戒已被修習、心已被修習、慧已被修習者的具備第四禪者的呼吸將不能被滅呢？

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, sutapubbo’’ ti.
‘‘ Kiṃ nu kho, mahārāja, so saddo kāye namite virameyyā’’ ti.
‘‘ Āma, bhante, virameyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 你是堪任者。

pali: ‘‘ So hi nāma, mahārāja, saddo abhāvitakāyassa abhāvitasīlassa abhāvitacittassa abhāvitapaññassa kāye namite viramissati, kiṃ pana bhāvitakāyassa bhāvitasīlassa bhāvitacittassa bhāvitapaññassa catutthajjhānaṃ samāpannassa assāsapassāsā na nirujjhissantī’’ ti.
chinese: 無論多少水都有那種程度的鹹(鹽)，無論多鹹都有那種程度的水，因此被稱為『海』。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
Assāsapassāsanirodhapañho ekādasamo.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: 12 . Samuddapañho
12. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena,‘ samuddo samuddo’ ti vuccati, kena kāraṇena udakaṃ‘ samuddo’ ti vuccatī’’ ti?
chinese: 13.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: Thero āha‘‘ yattakaṃ, mahārāja, udakaṃ, tattakaṃ loṇaṃ.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Yattakaṃ loṇaṃ, tattakaṃ udakaṃ.
chinese: 以水的長久被住立狀態而海是一味：鹹味。

pali: Tasmā‘ samuddo’ ti vuccatī’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
Samuddapañho dvādasamo.
chinese: 海是一味的問題第十三。

pali: 13 . Samuddaekarasapañho
chinese: 14.精細的問題 [目錄]

pali: 13. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, kena kāraṇena samuddo ekaraso loṇaraso’’ ti?
chinese: 能切斷最精細的嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Cirasaṇṭhitattā kho, mahārāja, udakassa samuddo ekaraso loṇaraso’’ ti.
chinese: 什麼是最精細的呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Samuddaekarasapañho terasamo.
chinese: 法是最精細的，大王！

pali: 14 . Sukhumapañho
14. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, sakkā sabbaṃ sukhumaṃ chinditun’’ ti?
chinese: [但]非諸法都是最精細的，『精細的』或『粗大的』這是法的同義語。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, sakkā sabbaṃ sukhumaṃ chinditun’’ ti.
chinese: 凡任何能被切斷的，一切都以慧切斷，慧的切斷沒有第二者。

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ pana, bhante, sabbaṃ sukhuman’’ ti?
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Dhammo kho, mahārāja, sabbasukhumo, na kho, mahārāja, dhammā sabbe sukhumā,‘ sukhuman’ ti vā‘ thūlan’ ti vā dhammānametamadhivacanaṃ.
chinese: 15.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: Yaṃ kiñci chinditabbaṃ, sabbaṃ taṃ paññāya chindati, natthi dutiyaṃ paññāya chedanan’’ ti.
chinese: 『識』或『慧』或『在生命類上的命』，這些法是不同含義與不同辭句，或者同一含義但不同辭句？

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Sukhumapañho cuddasamo.
15 . Viññāṇanānatthapañho
chinese: 識知相為識，知道相為慧，在生命類上的命不被獲得。

pali: 15. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena,‘ viññāṇan’ ti vā‘ paññā’ ti vā‘ bhūtasmiṃ jīvo’ ti vā ime dhammā nānatthā ceva nānābyañjanā ca, udāhu ekatthā byañjanameva nānan’’ ti ?
chinese: 以舌嚐味道；

pali: ‘‘ Vijānanalakkhaṇaṃ, mahārāja, viññāṇaṃ, pajānanalakkhaṇā paññā, bhūtasmiṃ jīvo nupalabbhatī’’ ti.
chinese: 」上座說：「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yadi jīvo nupalabbhati, atha ko carahi cakkhunā rūpaṃ passati, sotena saddaṃ suṇāti, ghānena gandhaṃ ghāyati, jivhāya rasaṃ sāyati, kāyena phoṭṭhabbaṃ phusati, manasā dhammaṃ vijānātī’’ ti?
chinese: 如果命以眼看見色……（中略）以識識知法，那個命在眼門被毀壞時以大空間外口更好的色他應該看見，在耳門被毀壞時、在鼻被毀壞時、在舌被毀壞時、在身被毀壞時以大空間更好的聲音他應該聽到、氣味他應該嗅到、味道他應該嘗到，所觸他應該觸到？

pali: Thero āha‘‘ yadi jīvo cakkhunā rūpaṃ passati… pe… manasā dhammaṃ vijānāti, so jīvo cakkhudvāresu uppāṭitesu mahantena ākāsena bahimukho suṭṭhutaraṃ rūpaṃ passeyya, sotesu uppāṭitesu, ghāne uppāṭite, jivhāya uppāṭitāya, kāye uppāṭite mahantena ākāsena suṭṭhutaraṃ saddaṃ suṇeyya, gandhaṃ ghāyeyya, rasaṃ sāyeyya, phoṭṭhabbaṃ phuseyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 16.國王說：「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi , bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 是否難做的被世尊做了呢？

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, bhūtasmiṃ jīvo nupalabbhatī’’ ti.
chinese: 難做的被世尊做了。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kallosi, bhante nāgasenā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: Viññāṇanānatthapañho pannarasamo.
chinese: 那麼，什麼難做的被世尊做了呢？

pali: 16 . Arūpadhammavavatthānadukkarapañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 16. Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, dukkaraṃ nu kho bhagavatā katan’’ ti?
chinese: 難做的被世尊做了：對這些無色的心心所法在一個所緣上之轉起，他告知區別：這是觸，這是受，這是想，這是思，這是心。

pali: Thero āha‘‘ dukkaraṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā katan’’ ti.
‘‘ Kiṃ pana, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā dukkaraṃ katan’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Dukkaraṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā kataṃ imesaṃ arūpīnaṃ cittacetasikānaṃ dhammānaṃ ekārammaṇe vattamānānaṃ vavatthānaṃ akkhātaṃ‘ ayaṃ phasso, ayaṃ vedanā, ayaṃ saññā, ayaṃ cetanā, idaṃ cittan’’’ ti.
chinese: 是否那位男子會知道：這是恆河的水，這是耶牟那河的水，這是阿致羅筏底河的水，這是薩羅浮河的水，這是摩醯河的水呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Opammaṃ karohī’’ ti.

‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, kocideva puriso nāvāya mahāsamuddaṃ ajjhogāhetvā hatthapuṭena udakaṃ gahetvā jivhāya sāyitvā jāneyya nu kho, mahārāja, so puriso‘‘ idaṃ gaṅgāya udakaṃ, idaṃ yamunāya udakaṃ, idaṃ aciravatiyā udakaṃ, idaṃ sarabhuyā udakaṃ, idaṃ mahiyā udakan’’’ ti?
chinese: 」國王「隨喜(同意)。

pali: ‘‘ Dukkaraṃ, bhante, jānitun’’ ti.
chinese: 無色法區別難做的問題第十六。

pali: ‘‘ Ito dukkarataraṃ kho, mahārāja, bhagavatā kataṃ imesaṃ arūpīnaṃ cittacetasikānaṃ dhammānaṃ ekārammaṇe vattamānānaṃ vavatthānaṃ akkhātaṃ‘ ayaṃ phasso, ayaṃ vedanā, ayaṃ saññā, ayaṃ cetanā, idaṃ cittan’’’ ti.
chinese: 在這品中有十六個問題。

pali: ‘‘ Suṭṭhu, bhante’’ ti rājā abbhānumodīti.
Arūpadhammavavatthānadukkarapañho soḷasamo.
Arūpadhammavavatthānavaggo sattamo.
Imasmiṃ vagge soḷasa pañhā.
Milindapañhapucchāvisajjanā
chinese: 彌蘭提問的問答

pali: Thero āha‘‘ jānāsi kho, mahārāja, sampati kā velā’’ ti?
chinese: 你知道現在是什麼時間嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, jānāmi‘ sampati paṭhamo yāmo atikkanto, majjhimo yāmo pavattati, ukkā padīpīyanti, cattāri paṭākāni āṇattāni gamissanti bhaṇḍato rājadeyyānī’’’ ti.
chinese: 臾那人們這麼說：「大王！

pali: Yonakā evamāhaṃsu‘‘ kallosi, mahārāja, paṇḍito thero’’ ti.
chinese: 你是堪任者，上座是賢智者。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhaṇe, paṇḍito thero, ediso ācariyo bhaveyya mādiso ca antevāsī, nacirasseva paṇḍito dhammaṃ ājāneyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 像這樣的應該成為老師，而如我的為徒弟，不久就會了知賢智法。

pali: Tassa pañhaveyyākaraṇena tuṭṭho rājā theraṃ nāgasenaṃ satasahassagghanakena kambalena acchādetvā‘‘ bhante nāgasena, ajjatagge te aṭṭhasataṃ bhattaṃ paññapemi, yaṃ kiñci antepure kappiyaṃ, tena ca pavāremī’’ ti āha.
chinese: 從今天起，我將為你準備八百份食物，以及凡任何在內宮中適當的我以那個邀請。

pali: Alaṃ mahārāja jīvāmī’’ ti.
‘‘ Jānāmi, bhante nāgasena, jīvasi, api ca attānañca rakkha, mamañca rakkhāhī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kathaṃ attānaṃ rakkhasi,‘ nāgaseno milindaṃ rājānaṃ pasādeti, na ca kiñci alabhī’ ti parāpavādo[ parappavādo( ka.)] āgaccheyyāti, evaṃ attānaṃ rakkha.
chinese: 『那先使彌蘭王淨信，但沒得到什麼。

pali: Kathaṃ mamaṃ rakkhasi,‘ milindo rājā pasanno pasannākāraṃ na karotī’ ti parāpavādo āgaccheyyāti, evaṃ mamaṃ rakkhāhī’’ ti.
chinese: 『淨信的彌蘭王不作淨信的行為。

pali: ‘‘ Tathā hotu, mahārājā’’ ti.
‘‘ Seyyathāpi, bhante, sīho migarājā suvaṇṇapañjare pakkhittopi bahimukho yeva hoti, evameva kho ahaṃ, bhante, kiñcāpi agāraṃ ajjhāvasāmi bahimukho yeva pana acchāmi.
chinese: 同樣的，大德！

pali: Sace ahaṃ, bhante, agārasmā anāgāriyaṃ pabbajeyyaṃ, na ciraṃ jīveyyaṃ, bahū me paccatthikā’’ ti.
chinese: 如果從家出家成為無家者，我應該活不久，我的敵人有很多。

pali: Atha kho āyasmā nāgaseno milindassa rañño pañhaṃ visajjetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā saṅghārāmaṃ agamāsi.
chinese: 那時，尊者那先回答彌蘭王的提問後，從座位起來後走到僧園。

pali: Acirapakkante ca āyasmante nāgasene milindassa rañño etadahosi‘‘ kiṃ mayā pucchitaṃ, kiṃ bhadantena nāgasenena visajjitan’’ ti?
chinese: 什麼被那先大德回答？

pali: Atha kho milindassa rañño etadahosi‘‘ sabbaṃ mayā supucchitaṃ, sabbaṃ bhadantena nāgasenena suvisajjitan’’ ti.
chinese: 」那時，彌蘭王想這個：「一切都被我善詢問，一切都被那先大德善回答。

pali: Āyasmatopi nāgasenassa saṅghārāmagatassa etadahosi‘‘ kiṃ milindena raññā pucchitaṃ, kiṃ mayā visajjitan’’ ti.
chinese: 什麼被我回答？

pali: Atha kho āyasmato nāgasenassa etadahosi‘‘ sabbaṃ milindena raññā supucchitaṃ, sabbaṃ mayā suvisajjitan’’ ti.
Atha kho āyasmā nāgaseno tassā rattiyā accayena pubbaṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena milindassa rañño nivesanaṃ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi.
chinese: 那時，彌蘭王向尊者那先問訊後，在一旁坐下。

pali: Atha kho milindo rājā āyasmantaṃ nāgasenaṃ abhivādetvā ekamantaṃ nisīdi, ekamantaṃ nisinno kho milindo rājā āyasmantaṃ nāgasenaṃ etadavoca–
chinese: 「大德不要這麼想：『「那先被我詢問問題。

pali: ‘ ‘ Mā kho bhadantassa evaṃ ahosi‘ nāgaseno mayā pañhaṃ pucchito’ ti teneva somanassena taṃ rattāvasesaṃ vītināmesīti na te evaṃ daṭṭhabbaṃ.
chinese: 對那個，那剩餘的夜晚我想這個：『什麼被我詢問？

pali: Tassa mayhaṃ, bhante, taṃ rattāvasesaṃ etadahosi‘ kiṃ mayā pucchitaṃ, kiṃ bhadantena visajjitan’ ti,‘ sabbaṃ mayā supucchitaṃ, sabbaṃ bhadantena suvisajjitan’’’ ti.
chinese: 上座也這麼說：「大王不要這麼想：『「彌蘭王的提問被我回答。

pali: Theropi evamāha–
‘‘ mā kho mahārājassa evaṃ ahosi‘ milindassa rañño mayā pañho visajjito’ ti teneva somanassena taṃ rattāvasesaṃ vītināmesīti na te evaṃ daṭṭhabbaṃ.
chinese: 』這不應該被你看作這樣，大王！

pali: Tassa mayhaṃ, mahārāja, taṃ rattāvasesaṃ etadahosi‘ kiṃ milindena raññā pucchitaṃ, kiṃ mayā visajjitan’ ti,‘ sabbaṃ milindena raññā supucchitaṃ, sabbaṃ mayā suvisajjitan’’’ ti itiha te mahānāgā aññamaññassa subhāsitaṃ samanumodiṃsūti.
chinese: 像這樣，他們大龍象喜悅互相間被善說的。

pali: Milindapañhapucchāvisajjanā niṭṭhitā.
chinese: 彌蘭的提問之問答已終了。

pali: Meṇḍakapañhārambhakathā
chinese: 難題的問題前言 [目錄]

pali: Aṭṭhamantaparivajjanīyaṭṭhānāni
chinese: 八個商量應該被避開處。

pali: Bhassappavādo [ bhassappavedī( sī. pī.)] vetaṇḍī, atibuddhi vicakkhaṇo;
chinese: 好議論者、詭辯家，是極聰慧者、明察者，

pali: Milindo ñāṇabhedāya, nāgasenamupāgami.
chinese: 彌蘭為了智的破壞，接近那先。

pali: Vasanto tassa chāyāya, paripucchaṃ punappunaṃ;
chinese: 當住在他的影子中時，一再地遍問，

pali: Pabhinnabuddhi hutvāna, sopi āsi tipeṭako.
chinese: 成為覺已發展者後，他也是三藏師。

pali: Navaṅgaṃ anumajjanto, rattibhāge rahogato;
chinese: 持續思惟著九分的：在夜晚時分獨處的，

pali: Addakkhi meṇḍake pañhe, dunniveṭhe saniggahe.
chinese: 在難題的問題處，在難離纏處、在有指責處他看見。

pali: ‘ ‘ Pariyāyabhāsitaṃ atthi, atthi sandhāyabhāsitaṃ;
chinese: 有法門所說的，有前後關連所說的，

pali: Sabhāvabhāsitaṃ atthi, dhammarājassa sāsane.
chinese: 有本質所說的：在法王的教說上。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tesamatthaṃ aviññāya, meṇḍake jinabhāsite;
chinese: 不了知它們的義理後：在勝者所說的難題上，

pali: Anāgatamhi addhāne, viggaho tattha hessati.
chinese: 在未來世時，在那裡將有諍論。

pali: ‘ ‘ Handa kathiṃ pasādetvā, chejjāpessāmi meṇḍake;
chinese: 使論述者淨信後，諸難題將被我切斷，

pali: Tassa niddiṭṭhamaggena, niddisissantyanāgate’’ ti.
chinese: 以他已解說的道路，在未來他們將解說。

pali: Atha kho milindo rājā pabhātāya rattiyā uddhaste[ uṭṭhite( syā.), uggate( sī. pī.)] aruṇe sīsaṃ nhatvā sirasi añjaliṃ paggahetvā atītānāgatapaccuppanne sammāsambuddhe anussaritvā aṭṭha vattapadāni samādiyi‘‘ ito me anāgatāni satta divasāni aṭṭha guṇe samādiyitvā tapo caritabbo bhavissati , sohaṃ ciṇṇatapo samāno ācariyaṃ ārādhetvā meṇḍake pañhe pucchissāmī’’ ti.

Atha kho milindo rājā pakatidussayugaṃ apanetvā ābharaṇāni ca omuñcitvā kāsāvaṃ nivāsetvā muṇḍakapaṭisīsakaṃ sīse paṭimuñcitvā munibhāvamupagantvā aṭṭha guṇe samādiyi‘‘ imaṃ sattāhaṃ mayā na rājattho anusāsitabbo, na rāgūpasañhitaṃ cittaṃ uppādetabbaṃ, na dosūpasañhitaṃ cittaṃ uppādetabbaṃ, na mohūpasañhitaṃ cittaṃ uppādetabbaṃ, dāsakammakaraporise janepi nivātavuttinā bhavitabbaṃ, kāyikaṃ vācasikaṃ anurakkhitabbaṃ, chapi āyatanāni niravasesato anurakkhitabbāni, mettābhāvanāya mānasaṃ pakkhipitabban’’ ti.
chinese: 這八條被受持後，他使心意就在那八條上住立。

pali: Ime aṭṭha guṇe samādiyitvā tesveva aṭṭhasu guṇesu mānasaṃ patiṭṭhapetvā bahi anikkhamitvā sattāhaṃ vītināmetvā aṭṭhame divase pabhātāya rattiyā pageva pātarāsaṃ katvā okkhittacakkhu mitabhāṇī susaṇṭhitena iriyāpathena avikkhittena cittena haṭṭhena udaggena vippasannena theraṃ nāgasenaṃ upasaṅkamitvā therassa pāde sirasā vanditvā ekamantaṃ ṭhito idamavoca–
chinese: 有我的某事應該被與你們一起商量，在那裡，任何其他第三者不應該被到達：在遠離的林野空場所、到達八支適合沙門處。

pali: ‘ ‘ Atthi me, bhante nāgasena, koci attho tumhehi saddhiṃ mantayitabbo, na tattha añño koci tatiyo icchitabbo, suññe okāse pavivitte araññe aṭṭhaṅgupāgate samaṇasāruppe.

Tattha so pañho pucchitabbo bhavissati, tattha me guyhaṃ na kātabbaṃ na rahassakaṃ, arahāmahaṃ rahassakaṃ suṇituṃ sumantane upagate, upamāyapi so attho upaparikkhitabbo, yathā kiṃ viya, yathā nāma, bhante nāgasena, mahāpathavī nikkhepaṃ arahati nikkhepe upagate.
Evameva kho, bhante nāgasena, arahāmahaṃ rahassakaṃ suṇituṃ sumantane upagate’’ ti.
chinese: 與老師一起進入遠離的森林後，他說這個：「那先大德！

pali: Garunā saha pavivittapavanaṃ pavisitvā idamavoca–
chinese: 這裡，有應該被想要商量男子避開的八處，有智的男子不在那些場所(處)商量義理：當被商量時，義理也沒落不生成。

pali: ‘‘ bhante nāgasena, idha purisena mantayitukāmena aṭṭha ṭhānāni parivajjayitabbāni bhavanti, na tesu ṭhānesu viññū puriso atthaṃ manteti, mantitopi attho paripatati na sambhavati.
chinese: 哪八處呢？

pali: Katamāni aṭṭha ṭhānāni?

Visamaṭṭhānaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ, sabhayaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ, ativātaṭṭhānaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ, paṭicchannaṭṭhānaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ, devaṭṭhānaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ, pantho parivajjanīyo, saṅgāmo[ saṅkamo( sī. pī.)] parivajjanīyo, udakatitthaṃ parivajjanīyaṃ.
chinese: 上座說：「在不平順處、有恐怖、強風、隱密、神住處、道路、戰場、水浴場有什麼缺點呢？

pali: Imāni aṭṭha ṭhānāni parivajjanīyānī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: Thero āha‘‘ ko doso visamaṭṭhāne, sabhaye, ativāte, paṭicchanne, devaṭṭhāne, panthe, saṅgāme, udakatitthe’’ ti?
chinese: 在有恐怖處意(心)驚駭，當已驚駭時，不察覺正確的義理。

pali: ‘‘ Visame, bhante nāgasena, mantito attho vikirati vidhamati paggharati na sambhavati, sabhaye mano santassati, santassito na sammā atthaṃ samanupassati, ativāte saddo avibhūto hoti, paṭicchanne upassutiṃ tiṭṭhanti, devaṭṭhāne mantito attho garukaṃ pariṇamati, panthe mantito attho tuccho bhavati, saṅgāme cañcalo bhavati, udakatitthe pākaṭo bhavati.
chinese: 『不平順、有恐怖、強風，隱密、神所依止，

pali: Bhavatīha–
chinese: 道路與戰場、浴場，這八處應該被避開。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Visamaṃ sabhayaṃ ativāto, paṭicchannaṃ devanissitaṃ;
chinese: 八個商量應該被避開處。

pali: Pantho ca saṅgāmo titthaṃ, aṭṭhete parivajjiyā’’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: Aṭṭha mantanassa parivajjanīyaṭṭhānāni.
chinese: 有這八人，當商量時，他們使商量的義理失敗，哪八個？

pali: Aṭṭhamantavināsakapuggalā
‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, aṭṭhime puggalā mantiyamānā mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādenti.
chinese: 『貪行者(性格者)、瞋行者、癡行者、慢行者、貪求者、怠惰者、單一思惟者、愚者。

pali: Katame aṭṭha?
Rāgacarito dosacarito mohacarito mānacarito luddho alaso ekacintī bāloti.
chinese: 』這是八人，當商量時，他們使商量的義理失敗。

pali: Ime aṭṭha puggalā mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādentī’’ ti.
chinese: 上座說：「他們的過錯是什麼？

pali: Thero āha‘‘ tesaṃ ko doso’’ ti?
chinese: 」「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Rāgacarito, bhante nāgasena, rāgavasena mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, dosacarito dosavasena mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, mohacarito mohavasena mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, mānacarito mānavasena mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, luddho lobhavasena mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, alaso alasatāya mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, ekacintī ekacintitāya mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti, bālo bālatāya mantitaṃ atthaṃ byāpādeti.
chinese: 『貪染者、憤怒者與愚昧者，有慢心者、貪求者、像這樣怠惰者，

pali: Bhavatīha–
‘ ‘‘ Ratto duṭṭho ca mūḷho ca, mānī luddho tathālaso;
chinese: 單一思惟者與愚者，這些是引起義理毀滅者。

pali: Ekacintī ca bālo ca, ete atthavināsakā’’’ ti.
chinese: 引起商量毀滅的八人。

pali: Aṭṭha mantavināsakapuggalā.
chinese: 秘密事之破壞的九人 [目錄]

pali: Navaguyhamantavidhaṃsakaṃ
‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, navime puggalā mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivaranti na dhārenti.
chinese: 有這九人，當被商量時他們公開秘密不保持，哪九個？

pali: Katame nava?
Rāgacarito dosacarito mohacarito bhīruko āmisagaruko itthī soṇḍo paṇḍako dārako’’ ti.
chinese: 貪行者、瞋行者、癡行者、膽怯者、重物質者、婦女、飲酒者、被去勢者、小孩。

pali: Thero āha‘‘ tesaṃ ko doso’’ ti?
chinese: 上座說：「他們的過錯是什麼？

pali: ‘‘ Rāgacarito, bhante nāgasena, rāgavasena mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, dosacarito, bhante , dosavasena mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, mūḷho mohavasena mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, bhīruko bhayavasena mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, āmisagaruko āmisahetu mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, itthī paññāya ittaratāya mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, soṇḍiko surālolatāya mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, paṇḍako anekaṃsikatāya mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti, dārako capalatāya mantitaṃ guyhaṃ vivarati na dhāreti.
chinese: 貪行者因貪而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，瞋行者因瞋而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，愚昧者因癡而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，膽怯者因害怕而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，重物質者物質之因而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，婦女以慧的善變而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，飲酒者以酒的貪婪而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，被去勢者以不一向性而當被商量時公開秘密不保持，小孩以浮躁性而當被商量時公開秘密不保持。

pali: Bhavatīha–
chinese: 在這裡，有：

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Ratto duṭṭho ca mūḷho ca, bhīru āmisagaruko[ āmisacakkhuko( sī. pī.)];
chinese: 『貪染者、憤怒者與愚昧者，膽怯者、重物質者，

pali: Itthī soṇḍo paṇḍako ca, navamo bhavati dārako.
chinese: 婦女、飲酒者與被去勢者，小孩為第九，

pali: ‘ ‘ Navete puggalā loke, ittarā calitā calā;
chinese: 世間中這九人，是善變者、搖動者、浮躁者。

pali: Etehi mantitaṃ guyhaṃ, khippaṃ bhavati pākaṭan’’’ ti.
chinese: 秘密事之破壞的九人。

pali: Nava guyhamantavidhaṃsakā puggalā.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: Aṭṭha paññāpaṭilābhakāraṇaṃ
chinese: 以八個因素而覺成熟、走到遍熟。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, aṭṭhahi kāraṇehi buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati.
chinese: 以哪八個因素呢？

pali: Katamehi aṭṭhahi?

Vayapariṇāmena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, yasapariṇāmena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, paripucchāya buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, titthasaṃvāsena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, yoniso manasikārena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, sākacchāya buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, snehūpasevanena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati, patirūpadesavāsena buddhi pariṇamati paripākaṃ gacchati.
chinese: 以交談以摯愛之追隨，與以適當地點之住所，

pali: Bhavatīha–
chinese: 這八處是，覺明淨的因素，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Vayena yasapucchāhi, titthavāsena yoniso;
chinese: 凡有這些生成者，他們的覺被發展。

pali: Sākacchā snehasaṃsevā, patirūpavasena ca.
chinese: 得到慧的八個因素。

pali: ‘ ‘ Etāni aṭṭha ṭhānāni, buddhivisadakāraṇā;
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: Yesaṃ etāni sambhonti, tesaṃ buddhi pabhijjatī’’’ ti.
Aṭṭha paññāpaṭilābhakāraṇāni.
Ācariyaguṇaṃ
chinese: 這地方商量的缺點已避開，且我是世間中最勝的論友，以及我是秘密的守護者，我終生都將守護秘密，以八個因素我的覺已到達成熟，現在如我者之徒弟是難獲得的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, ayaṃ bhūmibhāgo aṭṭha mantadosavivajjito, ahañca loke paramo mantisahāyo[ mantasahāyo( sī.)], guyhamanurakkhī cāhaṃ yāvāhaṃ jīvissāmi tāva guyhamanurakkhissāmi, aṭṭhahi ca me kāraṇehi buddhi pariṇāmaṃ gatā, dullabho etarahi mādiso antevāsī, sammā paṭipanne antevāsike ye ācariyānaṃ pañcavīsati ācariyaguṇā, tehi guṇehi ācariyena sammā paṭipajjitabbaṃ.
chinese: 放不放逸應該被知道。

pali: Katame pañcavīsati guṇā?
chinese: 睡眠之許可應該被知道。

pali: ‘ ‘ Idha, bhante nāgasena, ācariyena antevāsimhi satataṃ samitaṃ ārakkhā upaṭṭhapetabbā, asevanasevanā jānitabbā, pamattāppamattā jānitabbā, seyyavakāso jānitabbo, gelaññaṃ jānitabbaṃ, bhojanassa[ bhojanīyaṃ( syā.)] laddhāladdhaṃ jānitabbaṃ, viseso jānitabbo, pattagataṃ saṃvibhajitabbaṃ, assāsitabbo‘ mā bhāyi, attho te abhikkamatī’ ti,‘ iminā puggalena paṭicaratī’ ti[ paṭicarāhīti( ka.)] paṭicāro jānitabbo, gāme paṭicāro jānitabbo, vihāre paṭicāro jānitabbo, na tena hāso davo kātabbo[ na tena saha sallāpo kātabbo( sī. pī.)], tena saha ālāpo kātabbo, chiddaṃ disvā adhivāsetabbaṃ, sakkaccakārinā bhavitabbaṃ, akhaṇḍakārinā bhavitabbaṃ, arahassakārinā bhavitabbaṃ, niravasesakārinā bhavitabbaṃ,‘ janemimaṃ[ jānemimaṃ( syā.)] sippesū’ ti janakacittaṃ upaṭṭhapetabbaṃ,‘ kathaṃ ayaṃ na parihāyeyyā’ ti vaḍḍhicittaṃ upaṭṭhapetabbaṃ,‘ balavaṃ imaṃ karomi sikkhābalenā’ ti cittaṃ upaṭṭhapetabbaṃ, mettacittaṃ upaṭṭhapetabbaṃ, āpadāsu na vijahitabbaṃ, karaṇīye nappamajjitabbaṃ, khalite dhammena paggahetabboti.
chinese: 大德！

pali: Ime kho, bhante, pañcavīsati ācariyassa ācariyaguṇā, tehi guṇehi mayi sammā paṭipajjassu, saṃsayo me, bhante, uppanno, atthi meṇḍakapañhā jinabhāsitā , anāgate addhāne tattha viggaho uppajjissati, anāgate ca addhāne dullabhā bhavissanti tumhādisā buddhimanto, tesu me pañhesu cakkhuṃ dehi paravādānaṃ niggahāyā’’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Upāsakaguṇaṃ
Thero ‘‘ sādhū’’ ti sampaṭicchitvā dasa upāsakassa upāsakaguṇe paridīpesi.
chinese: 是依個人的力量樂於分享者。

pali: ‘‘ Dasa ime, mahārāja, upāsakassa upāsakaguṇā.
chinese: 看見勝者之教(佛教)衰退後他為了增長努力。

pali: Katame dasa , idha, mahārāja, upāsako saṅghena samānasukhadukkho hoti, dhammādhipateyyo hoti, yathābalaṃ saṃvibhāgarato hoti, jinasāsanaparihāniṃ disvā abhivaḍḍhiyā vāyamati.
chinese: 是樂於和合、愛好和合者。

pali: Sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, apagatakotūhalamaṅgaliko jīvitahetupi na aññaṃ satthāraṃ uddisati, kāyikavācasikañcassa rakkhitaṃ hoti, samaggārāmo hoti samaggarato, anusūyako hoti, na ca kuhanavasena sāsane carati, buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gato hoti, dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gato hoti, saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gato hoti.
chinese: 凡你看見勝者之教衰退後你想要增長，那對你是適當的、已得到的、能相應的、相稱的。

pali: Ime kho, mahārāja, dasa upāsakassa upāsakaguṇā, te sabbe guṇā tayi saṃvijjanti, taṃ te yuttaṃ pattaṃ anucchavikaṃ patirūpaṃ yaṃ tvaṃ jinasāsanaparihāniṃ disvā abhivaḍḍhiṃ icchasi, karomi te okāsaṃ, puccha maṃ tvaṃ yathāsukhan’’ ti.
chinese: 難題的問題前言已終了。

pali: Meṇḍakapañhārambhakathā niṭṭhitā.
4. Meṇḍakapañho
chinese: 4.難題的問題

pali: 1 . Iddhibalavaggo
1 . Katādhikārasaphalapañho
chinese: 1.神通力品 [目錄]

pali: 1. Atha kho milindo rājā katāvakāso nipacca garuno pāde sirasi añjaliṃ katvā etadavoca‘‘ bhante nāgasena, ime titthiyā evaṃ bhaṇanti[ vañco bhavati aphalo( sī. pī. ka.)]‘ yadi buddho pūjaṃ sādiyati, na parinibbuto buddho saṃyutto lokena antobhaviko lokasmiṃ lokasādhāraṇo, tasmā tassa kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 這些外道這麼說：『如果佛陀受用供養，則佛陀是未般涅槃者、與世間有關係者、在世間內存在者、共世間者，因此，對他所作的熱望是功不唐捐的、有果的。

pali: Yadi parinibbuto visaṃyutto lokena nissaṭo sabbabhavehi, tassa pūjā nuppajjati, parinibbuto na kiñci sādiyati, asādiyantassa kato adhikāro vañjho bhavati aphalo’ ti ubhato koṭiko eso pañho, neso visayo appattamānasānaṃ, mahantānaṃ yeveso visayo, bhindetaṃ diṭṭhijālaṃ ekaṃse ṭhapaya, taveso pañho anuppatto, anāgatānaṃ jinaputtānaṃ cakkhuṃ dehi paravādaniggahāyā’’ ti.
chinese: 』這是兩難的問題，這不是心意未達成者的領域，僅是偉大者的領域，願裂破那個見網，請你在一邊上使之住立。

pali: Thero āha‘‘ parinibbuto, mahārāja, bhagavā, na ca bhagavā pūjaṃ sādiyati, bodhimūle yeva tathāgatassa sādiyanā pahīnā, kiṃ pana anupādisesāya nibbānadhātuyā parinibbutassa.
chinese: 世尊是般涅槃者，且世尊不受用供養。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 在菩提樹下，如來的受用就已捨斷，更何況對般涅槃於無餘涅槃界者。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Pūjiyantā[ pūjitā( syā.)] asamasamā, sadevamānusehi te;
chinese: 這也被法將舍利弗上座說：

pali: Na sādiyanti sakkāraṃ, buddhānaṃ esa dhammatā’’’ ti.
chinese: 『無完全相等者們，他們是應該被包括天-人們尊敬者，

pali: Rājā āha‘‘ bhante nāgasena, putto vā pituno vaṇṇaṃ bhāsati, pitā vā puttassa vaṇṇaṃ bhāsati, na cetaṃ kāraṇaṃ paravādānaṃ niggahāya, pasādappakāsanaṃ nāmetaṃ, iṅgha me tvaṃ tattha kāraṇaṃ sammā brūhi sakavādassa patiṭṭhāpanāya diṭṭhijālaviniveṭhanāyā’’ ti.
chinese: 在正確理由那裡，為了見網的解開，請你為我說自己確立的言說。

pali: Thero āha‘‘ parinibbuto, mahārāja, bhagavā, na ca bhagavā pūjaṃ sādiyati, asādiyantasseva tathāgatassa devamanussā dhāturatanaṃ vatthuṃ karitvā tathāgatassa ñāṇaratanārammaṇena sammāpaṭipattiṃ sevantā tisso sampattiyo paṭilabhanti.
chinese: 天-人們為即便無受用的如來舍利寶作依處後，以如來的智寶為所緣，成為正確行道的從事者，他們得到三種成就。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā , mahārāja, mahatimahāaggikkhandho pajjalitvā nibbāyeyya, api nu kho so, mahārāja, mahāaggikkhandho sādiyati tiṇakaṭṭhupādānan’’ ti?
chinese: 是否那個大火聚還受用草木燃料呢？

pali: ‘‘ Jalamānopi so, bhante, mahāaggikkhandho tiṇakaṭṭhupādānaṃ na sādiyati, kiṃ pana nibbuto upasanto acetano sādiyati?
chinese: 當燃燒時，那個大火聚也不受用草木燃料，那麼，為何已寂靜的、已止息的、無意識的它受用呢？

pali: ‘‘ Tasmiṃ pana, mahārāja, aggikkhandhe uparate upasante loke aggi suñño hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 那麼，在那個大火聚已止息、已寂靜時，火在世間中是空的？

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, kaṭṭhaṃ aggissa vatthu hoti upādānaṃ, ye keci manussā aggikāmā, te attano thāmabalavīriyena paccattapurisakārena kaṭṭhaṃ manthayitvā[ madditvā( ka.)] aggiṃ nibbattetvā tena agginā aggikaraṇīyāni kammāni karontī’’ ti.
chinese: 木材是火的燃料依處，凡任何想要火的人，他們以自己的剛毅力之活力，以各自的男子氣概(勇猛)鑽動木材後使火產生，然後以那個火做火應該被作的工作。

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, titthiyānaṃ vacanaṃ micchā bhavati‘ asādiyantassa kato adhikāro vañjho bhavati aphalo’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，外道的言語是錯誤的：『對不受用者所作的熱望是徒然白費的、無果的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, mahatimahāaggikkhandho pajjali, evameva bhagavā dasasahassiyā[ dasasahassimhi( sī. pī. ka.)] lokadhātuyā buddhasiriyā pajjali.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, mahatimahāaggikkhandho pajjalitvā nibbuto, evameva bhagavā dasasahassiyā lokadhātuyā buddhasiriyā pajjalitvā anupādisesāya nibbānadhātuyā parinibbuto.
chinese: 如已熄滅的火聚不受用草木燃料。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, nibbuto aggikkhandho tiṇakaṭṭhupādānaṃ na sādiyati, evameva kho lokahitassa sādiyanā pahīnā upasantā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, manussā nibbute aggikkhandhe anupādāne attano thāmabalavīriyena paccattapurisakārena kaṭṭhaṃ manthayitvā aggiṃ nibbattetvā tena agginā aggikaraṇīyāni kammāni karonti, evameva kho devamanussā tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva dhāturatanaṃ vatthuṃ karitvā tathāgatassa ñāṇaratanārammaṇena sammāpaṭipattiṃ sevantā tisso sampattiyo paṭilabhanti, imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 其次，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi yena kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 如大的大風吹後會停止，大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, mahatimahāvāto vāyitvā uparameyya, api nu kho so, mahārāja, uparato vāto sādiyati puna nibbattāpanan’’ ti?
chinese: 已停止風的思惟或作意不進一步地成為再現，什麼原因呢？

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, uparatassa vātassa ābhogo vā manasikāro vā puna nibbattāpanāya’’.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Kiṃ kāraṇaṃ’’?
‘‘ Acetanā sā vāyodhātū’’ ti.
chinese: 是否已停止的風也離開『風』的名稱呢？

pali: ‘‘ Api nu tassa, mahārāja, uparatassa vātassa vātoti samaññā apagacchatī’’ ti?
chinese: 這確實不是。

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, tālavaṇṭavidhūpanāni vātassa uppattiyā paccayā, ye keci manussā uṇhābhitattā pariḷāhaparipīḷitā, te tālavaṇṭena vā vidhūpanena vā attano thāmabalavīriyena paccattapurisakārena taṃ nibbattetvā tena vātena uṇhaṃ nibbāpenti pariḷāhaṃ vūpasamentī’’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，外道的言語是錯誤的：『對不受用者所作的熱望是徒然白費的、無果的。

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, titthiyānaṃ vacanaṃ micchā bhavati‘ asādiyantassa kato adhikāro vañjho bhavati aphalo’ ti.
chinese: 如大的大風吹。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, mahatimahāvāto vāyi, evameva bhagavā dasasahassiyā lokadhātuyā sītalamadhurasantasukhumamettāvātena upavāyi.
chinese: 如大的大風吹後已停止。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, mahatimahāvāto vāyitvā uparato, evameva bhagavā sītalamadhurasantasukhumamettāvātena upavāyitvā anupādisesāya nibbānadhātuyā parinibbuto.
chinese: 已停止的風不更進一步地受用再現。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, uparato vāto puna nibbattāpanaṃ na sādiyati, evameva lokahitassa sādiyanā pahīnā upasantā.
chinese: 如那些被熱耗盡、遍燒、傷害的人。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, te manussā uṇhābhitattā pariḷāhaparipīḷitā, evameva devamanussā tividhaggisantāpapariḷāhaparipīḷitā.
chinese: 如以多羅樹葉扇子為緣有風的產生。

pali: Yathā tālavaṇṭavidhūpanāni vātassa nibbattiyā paccayā honti, evameva tathāgatassa dhātu ca ñāṇaratanañca paccayo hoti tissannaṃ sampattīnaṃ paṭilābhāya.
chinese: 如被熱耗盡、遍燒、傷害的人，他們以多羅樹葉或以扇子使風產生後，使熱冷卻，使熱惱平息。

pali: Yathā manussā uṇhābhitattā pariḷāhaparipīḷitā tālavaṇṭena vā vidhūpanena vā vātaṃ nibbattetvā uṇhaṃ nibbāpenti pariḷāhaṃ vūpasamenti, evameva devamanussā tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva dhātuñca ñāṇaratanañca pūjetvā kusalaṃ nibbattetvā tena kusalena tividhaggisantāpapariḷāhaṃ nibbāpenti vūpasamenti.
chinese: 其次，大王！

pali: Imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 如男子打鼓後會產生聲音，凡那個被男子產生的鼓聲，那個聲音會消失，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi paravādānaṃ niggahāya.
Yathā, mahārāja, puriso bheriṃ ākoṭetvā saddaṃ nibbatteyya, yo so bherisaddo purisena nibbattito, so saddo antaradhāyeyya, api nu kho so, mahārāja, saddo sādiyati puna nibbattāpanan’’ ti?
chinese: 那個聲音已消失，對它的生起，沒有更進一步的思惟或作意，在一次所產生的鼓聲已消失時，那個鼓聲已被斷絕，大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, antarahito so saddo, natthi tassa puna uppādāya ābhogo vā manasikāro vā, sakiṃ nibbatte bherisadde antarahite so bherisaddo samucchinno hoti.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: Bherī pana, bhante, paccayo hoti saddassa nibbattiyā, atha puriso paccaye sati attajena vāyāmena bheriṃ akoṭetvā saddaṃ nibbattetī’’ ti.
chinese: 世尊是使戒、定、慧、解脫、解脫知見遍滿舍利寶、法、律、教誡的大師，除了自己已般涅槃於無餘涅槃界之外，在世尊般涅槃時，成就的獲得並沒被斷絕。

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, bhagavā sīlasamādhipaññāvimuttivimuttiñāṇadassanaparibhāvitaṃ dhāturatanañca dhammañca vinayañca anusiṭṭhañca[ anusatthiñca( sī. pī.)] satthāraṃ ṭhapayitvā sayaṃ anupādisesāya nibbānadhātuyā parinibbuto, na ca parinibbute bhagavati sampattilābho upacchinno hoti, bhavadukkhapaṭipīḷitā sattā dhāturatanañca dhammañca vinayañca anusiṭṭhañca paccayaṃ karitvā sampattikāmā sampattiyo paṭilabhanti, imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 但這不應該被看作這樣，阿難！

pali: ‘ ‘ Diṭṭhañcetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā anāgatamaddhānaṃ.
chinese: 凡你們被我教導、告知的法與律，我死後就是你們的大師。

pali: Kathitañca bhaṇitañca ācikkhitañca‘ siyā kho panānanda, tumhākaṃ evamassa atītasatthukaṃ pāvacanaṃ natthi no satthāti, na kho panetaṃ, ānanda, evaṃ daṭṭhabbaṃ, yo vo, ānanda, mayā dhammo ca vinayo ca desito paññatto, so vo mamaccayena satthā’ ti.
chinese: [DN.16, 216段]』對已般涅槃、即便無受用的如來所作的熱望是功不唐捐的、有果的，那個那些外道的言語是錯誤的、不實的、離真實的、虛假的、違反的、顛倒的，是苦之施與者，有『應該去苦界的苦果報。

pali: Parinibbutassa tathāgatassa asādiyantassa kato adhikāro vañjho bhavati aphaloti, taṃ tesaṃ titthiyānaṃ vacanaṃ micchā abhūtaṃ vitathaṃ alikaṃ viruddhaṃ viparītaṃ dukkhadāyakaṃ dukkhavipākaṃ apāyagamanīyanti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi yena kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Sādiyati nu kho, mahārāja, ayaṃ mahāpathavī‘ sabbabījāni mayi saṃviruhantū’’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，為何那些種子在不受用的大地上全生長，然後成為強壯根之結縛住立的，樹幹堅實枝條廣布的，持有花果的呢？

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kissa pana tāni, mahārāja, bījāni asādiyantiyā mahāpathaviyā saṃviruhitvā daḷhamūlajaṭāpatiṭṭhitā khandhasārasākhāparivitthiṇṇā pupphaphaladharā hontī’’ ti?
chinese: 大地雖不受用，它對那些種子是依處緣，它給與生長，那些種子依止那個依處後，以那個緣完全生長，然後成為強壯根之結縛住立的，樹幹堅實枝條廣布的，持有花果的。

pali: ‘‘ Asādiyantīpi, bhante, mahāpathavī tesaṃ bījānaṃ vatthuṃ hoti paccayaṃ deti viruhanāya, tāni bījāni taṃ vatthuṃ nissāya tena paccayena saṃviruhitvā daḷhamūlajaṭāpatiṭṭhitā khandhasārasākhāparivitthiṇṇā pupphaphaladharā hontī’’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，外道們在自己的言說上是破滅的、破壞的、違反的，如果他們說：『對不受用者所作的熱望是徒然白費的、無果的。

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, titthiyā sake vāde naṭṭhā honti hatā viruddhā, sace te bhaṇanti‘ asādiyantassa kato adhikāro vañjho bhavati aphalo’ ti.
chinese: 如大地不受用任何事物，這樣，如來不受用任何事物。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, mahāpathavī, evaṃ tathāgato arahaṃ sammāsambuddho.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, mahāpathavī na kiñci sādiyati, evaṃ tathāgato na kiñci sādiyati.

Yathā, mahārāja, tāni bījāni pathaviṃ nissāya saṃviruhitvā daḷhamūlajaṭāpatiṭṭhitā khandhasārasākhāparivitthiṇṇā pupphaphaladharā honti, evaṃ devamanussā tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva dhātuñca ñāṇaratanañca nissāya daḷhakusalamūlapatiṭṭhitā samādhikkhandhadhammasārasīlasākhāparivitthiṇṇā vimuttipupphasāmaññaphaladharā honti, imināpi, mahārāja , kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 是否這些駱駝、公牛、

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi yena kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Sādiyanti nu kho, mahārāja, ime oṭṭhā goṇā gadrabhā ajā pasū manussā antokucchismiṃ kimikulānaṃ sambhavan’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Kissa pana te, mahārāja, kimayo tesaṃ asādiyantānaṃ antokucchismiṃ sambhavitvā bahuputtanattā vepullataṃ pāpuṇantī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Pāpassa, bhante, kammassa balavatāya asādiyantānaṃ yeva tesaṃ sattānaṃ antokucchismiṃ kimayo sambhavitvā bahuputtanattā vepullataṃ pāpuṇantī’’ ti.
chinese: 其次，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva dhātussa ca ñāṇārammaṇassa ca balavatāya tathāgate kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 這些人們受用這九十八種病在身體中產生？

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi yena kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 是以前世所作的惡行。

pali: Sādiyanti nu kho, mahārāja, ime manussā ime aṭṭhanavuti rogā kāye nibbattantū’’ ti?
chinese: 如果前世所作不善在此世被感受，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Kissa pana te, mahārāja, rogā asādiyantānaṃ kāye nipatantī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Pubbe katena, bhante, duccaritenā’’ ti.
‘‘ Yadi, mahārāja, pubbe kataṃ akusalaṃ idha vedanīyaṃ hoti, tena hi, mahārāja, pubbe katampi idha katampi kusalākusalaṃ kammaṃ avañjhaṃ bhavati saphalanti.
chinese: 往昔名為難陀葛的夜叉襲擊舍利弗上座後進入地中[SA.1330, 陷入地中]被你聽聞？

pali: Imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 它被聽聞，這是世間中眾所周知的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Sutapubbaṃ pana tayā, mahārāja, nandako nāma yakkho theraṃ sāriputtaṃ āsādayitvā pathaviṃ paviṭṭho’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, suyyati, loke pākaṭo eso’’ ti.
‘‘ Api nu kho, mahārāja, thero sāriputto sādiyi nandakassa yakkhassa mahāpathavigilanan’’ ti [ pavattamānepi( syā.)].
chinese: 即當使包括天神的世間膨脹，即使當日月跌落到地上，即使當須彌山王散落，舍利弗上座也不會受用他人的苦，那是什麼原因？

pali: ‘‘ Ubbattiyantepi, bhante, sadevake loke patamānepi chamāyaṃ candimasūriye vikirantepi sinerupabbatarāje thero sāriputto na parassa dukkhaṃ sādiyeyya.
chinese: 以使原因根除的狀態，即使對奪命者舍利弗上座也不會產生(作)憤怒。

pali: Taṃ kissa hetu?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Yena hetunā thero sāriputto kujjheyya vā dusseyya vā, so hetu therassa sāriputtassa samūhato samucchinno, hetuno samugghātitattā, bhante, thero sāriputto jīvitahārakepi kopaṃ na kareyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yadi, mahārāja , thero sāriputto nandakassa yakkhassa pathavigilanaṃ na sādiyi, kissa pana nandako yakkho pathaviṃ paviṭṭho’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Akusalassa, bhante, kammassa balavatāyā’’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，雖對不善業的力勢無受用者所作的熱望也是功不唐捐的、有果的。

pali: ‘‘ Yadi, mahārāja, akusalassa kammassa balavatāya nandako yakkho pathaviṃ paviṭṭho, asādiyantassāpi kato aparādho avañjho bhavati saphalo.
chinese: 也以這個理由，對已般涅槃、即便無受用的如來所作的熱望是功不唐捐的、有果的。

pali: Tena hi, mahārāja, akusalassapi kammassa balavatāya asādiyantassa kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 現在那些進入到大地的人們有多少，在那裡，有你的聽聞嗎？

pali: Imināpi, mahārāja, kāraṇena tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphaloti.
chinese: 請你宣布。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kati nu kho te, mahārāja, manussā, ye etarahi mahāpathaviṃ paviṭṭhā, atthi te tattha savaṇan’’ ti?
chinese: 」「這個被我聽聞：『女學生婆羅門基者、釋迦族的蘇玻弗多、提婆達多上座、難陀葛夜叉、學生婆羅門難陀。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, bhante, suyyatī’’ ti.
chinese: 這五人已進入大地。

pali: ‘‘ Iṅgha tvaṃ, mahārāja, sāvehī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Ciñcamāṇavikā, bhante, suppabuddho ca sakko, devadatto ca thero, nandako ca yakkho, nando ca māṇavakoti.
chinese: 是否世尊與弟子們受用這些人的大地之進入呢？

pali: Sutametaṃ, bhante, ime pañca janā mahāpathaviṃ paviṭṭhā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Kismiṃ te, mahārāja, aparaddhā’’ ti?
‘‘ Bhagavati ca, bhante, sāvakesu cā’’ ti.
chinese: 那樣的話，對已般涅槃、即便無受用的如來所作的熱望是功不唐捐的、有果的。

pali: ‘‘ Api nu kho, mahārāja , bhagavā vā sāvakā vā sādiyiṃsu imesaṃ mahāpathavipavisanan’’ ti?
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Tena hi, mahārāja, tathāgatassa parinibbutassa asādiyantasseva kato adhikāro avañjho bhavati saphalo’’ ti.
chinese: 甚深的問題被善教授、被作明顯，秘密被顯示，打結處被打破，密叢被作非密叢，異說被毀滅，惡見被破壞， 惡外道的無光輝被生起，你是眾主之殊勝者、最頂尖者、常侍者。

pali: ‘‘ Suviññāpito, bhante nāgasena, pañho gambhīro uttānīkato, guyhaṃ vidaṃsitaṃ , gaṇṭhi bhinno, gahanaṃ agahanaṃ kataṃ, naṭṭhā paravādā, bhaggā kudiṭṭhī, nippabhā jātā kutitthiyā, tvaṃ gaṇīvarapavaramāsajjā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「是的，大王！

pali: Katādhikārasaphalapañho paṭhamo.
2 . Sabbaññubhāvapañho
2.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, buddho sabbaññū’’ ti?
chinese: 世尊是一切知者，但世尊的智見不常恆地、持續地被現起，世尊的一切知智是依靠貫注的，使之貫注後凡想要的他知道。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, bhagavā sabbaññū, na ca bhagavato satataṃ samitaṃ ñāṇadassanaṃ paccupaṭṭhitaṃ, āvajjanapaṭibaddhaṃ bhagavato sabbaññutañāṇaṃ, āvajjitvā yadicchakaṃ jānātī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Tena hi, bhante nāgasena, buddho asabbaññūti.
Yadi tassa pariyesanāya sabbaññutañāṇaṃ hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 一百輛貨車的稻米，以一車有六個半阿曼那與兩頓巴的稻米，在一彈指剎那時，心轉起者使好幾十萬稻米被住立著，他能走到遍盡、遍取？

pali: ‘‘ Vāhasataṃ kho, mahārāja, vīhīnaṃ aḍḍhacūḷañca vāhā vīhisattambaṇāni dve ca tumbā ekaccharākkhaṇe pavattacittassa ettakā vīhī lakkhaṃ ṭhapīyamānā[ ṭhapīyamāne( sī. pī.)] parikkhayaṃ pariyādānaṃ gaccheyyuṃ?
chinese: 凡那些有貪、有瞋、有癡、有污染、身未被修習、戒未被修習、心未被修習、慧未被修習者，他們的那個心重地生起，徐緩地轉起。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tatrime sattavidhā cittā pavattanti, ye te, mahārāja, sarāgā sadosā samohā sakilesā abhāvitakāyā abhāvitasīlā abhāvitacittā abhāvitapaññā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 如當延伸的、龐大的、廣大的、纏繞糾纏的、枝條結縛糾纏的竹莖被拉時，它是重的，到來是徐緩的，什麼原因呢？

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Abhāvitattā cittassa.
Yathā, mahārāja, vaṃsanāḷassa vitatassa visālassa vitthiṇṇassa saṃsibbitavisibbitassa sākhājaṭājaṭitassa ākaḍḍhiyantassa garukaṃ hoti āgamanaṃ dandhaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Saṃsibbitavisibbitattā sākhānaṃ.
chinese: 凡那些有貪、有瞋、有癡、有污染、身未被修習、戒未被修習、心未被修習、慧未被修習者，他們的那個心重地生起，徐緩地轉起，什麼原因呢？

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te sarāgā sadosā samohā sakilesā abhāvitakāyā abhāvitasīlā abhāvitacittā abhāvitapaññā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 在那裡，這第二種心來到被分別：大王！

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Saṃsibbitavisibbitattā kilesehi, idaṃ paṭhamaṃ cittaṃ.
‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ dutiyaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, sotāpannā pihitāpāyā diṭṭhippattā viññātasatthusāsanā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ tīsu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在三處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Tīsu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā.
chinese: 如當三結節已遍純淨的、上方枝條結縛糾纏的竹莖被拉時，在三結節的範圍它快速地來，從那裡的上方是僵硬的。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, vaṃsanāḷassa tipabbagaṇṭhiparisuddhassa upari sākhājaṭājaṭitassa ākaḍḍhiyantassa yāva tipabbaṃ tāva lahukaṃ eti, tato upari thaddhaṃ.
chinese: 是下方已遍純淨的狀態、上方枝條結縛糾纏的狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Heṭṭhā parisuddhattā upari sākhājaṭājaṭitattā.

Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te sotāpannā pihitāpāyā diṭṭhippattā viññātasatthusāsanā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ tīsu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在三處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Tīsu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā, idaṃ dutiyaṃ cittaṃ.
chinese: 在那裡，這第三種心來到被分別：大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ tatiyaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, sakadāgāmino, yesaṃ rāgadosamohā tanubhūtā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ pañcasu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在五處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Pañcasu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, vaṃsanāḷassa pañcapabbagaṇṭhiparisuddhassa upari sākhājaṭājaṭitassa ākaḍḍhiyantassa yāva pañcapabbaṃ tāva lahukaṃ eti, tato upari thaddhaṃ.
chinese: 是下方已遍純淨的狀態、上方枝條結縛糾纏的狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Heṭṭhā parisuddhattā upari sākhājaṭājaṭitattā.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te sakadāgāmino, yesaṃ rāgadosamohā tanubhūtā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ pañcasu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在五處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Pañcasu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā, idaṃ tatiyaṃ cittaṃ.
chinese: 在那裡，這第四種心來到被分別：大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ catutthaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, anāgāmino, yesaṃ pañcorambhāgiyāni saññojanāni pahīnāni, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ dasasu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在十處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Dasasu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, vaṃsanāḷassa dasapabbagaṇṭhiparisuddhassa upari sākhājaṭājaṭitassa ākaḍḍhiyantassa yāva dasapabbaṃ tāva lahukaṃ eti, tato upari thaddhaṃ.
chinese: 是下方已遍純淨的狀態、上方枝條結縛糾纏的狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Heṭṭhā parisuddhattā upari sākhājaṭājaṭitattā.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te anāgāmino, yesaṃ pañcorambhāgiyāni saññojanāni pahīnāni, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ dasasu ṭhānesu lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, uparibhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 是在十處心的遍純淨狀態，上方污染的未被捨斷狀態。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Dasasu ṭhānesu cittassa parisuddhattā upari kilesānaṃ appahīnattā, idaṃ catutthaṃ cittaṃ.
chinese: 在那裡，這第五種心來到被分別：大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ pañcamaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, arahanto khīṇāsavā dhotamalā vantakilesā vusitavanto katakaraṇīyā ohitabhārā anuppattasadatthā parikkhīṇabhavasaññojanā pattapaṭisambhidā sāvakabhūmīsu parisuddhā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sāvakavisaye lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, paccekabuddhabhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 什麼原因呢？

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Parisuddhattā sāvakavisaye, aparisuddhattā paccekabuddhavisaye.
chinese: 是在弟子領域處遍純淨狀態，在辟支佛階位處未遍純淨狀態。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, vaṃsanāḷassa sabbapabbagaṇṭhiparisuddhassa ākaḍḍhiyantassa lahukaṃ hoti āgamanaṃ adandhaṃ.
chinese: 什麼原因呢？

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Sabbapabbagaṇṭhiparisuddhattā agahanattā vaṃsassa.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te arahanto khīṇāsavā dhotamalā vantakilesā vusitavanto katakaraṇīyā ohitabhārā anuppattasadatthā parikkhīṇabhavasaññojanā pattapaṭisambhidā sāvakabhūmīsu parisuddhā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sāvakavisaye lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, paccekabuddhabhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 凡那些漏已滅盡的、垢穢已洗淨的、污染已吐出的、應該被作的已作、負擔已卸的、自己的利益已達成的、有之結已遍滅盡的、無礙解已得到、在弟子階位上已遍純淨的阿羅漢，他們的那個心在弟子領域處快速地生起，快速地轉起，在辟支佛階位處重地生起，徐緩地轉起。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Parisuddhattā sāvakavisaye, aparisuddhattā paccekabuddhavisaye, idaṃ pañcamaṃ cittaṃ.
chinese: 是在弟子領域處遍純淨狀態，在辟支佛階位處未遍純淨狀態。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ chaṭṭhaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, paccekabuddhā sayambhuno anācariyakā ekacārino khaggavisāṇakappā sakavisaye parisuddhavimalacittā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sakavisaye lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, sabbaññubuddhabhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 凡那些獨存(自存)的、無老師的、獨行的、如犀牛角般的、在自己領域處心已遍純淨離垢的辟支佛，他們的那個心在自己領域處快速地生起，快速地轉起，在一切知佛陀階位處重地生起，徐緩地轉起。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Parisuddhattā sakavisaye mahantattā sabbaññubuddhavisayassa.

Yathā, mahārāja, puriso sakavisayaṃ parittaṃ nadiṃ rattimpi divāpi yadicchaka acchambhito otareyya, atha parato mahāsamuddaṃ gambhīraṃ vitthataṃ agādhamapāraṃ disvā bhāyeyya, dandhāyeyya na visaheyya otarituṃ.
chinese: 如在自己領域處的男子，即使日夜，凡想要時他都能不恐懼地跳入小河，然後，在另一邊，看見甚深的、廣的、無立足處的、無彼岸的大海後他會害怕、會遲疑、會不敢跳入。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Tiṇṇattā[ ciṇṇattā( sī. syā. pī.)] sakavisayassa, mahantattā ca mahāsamuddassa.

Evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te paccekabuddhā sayambhuno anācariyakā ekacārino khaggavisāṇakappā sakavisaye parisuddhavimalacittā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sakavisaye lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati, sabbaññubuddhabhūmīsu garukaṃ uppajjati dandhaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 凡那些獨存的、無老師的、獨行的、如犀牛角般的、在弟子領域處心已遍純淨離垢的辟支佛，他們的那個心在自己領域處快速地生起，快速地轉起，在一切知佛陀階位處重地生起，徐緩地轉起。

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Parisuddhattā sakavisaye mahantattā sabbaññubuddhavisayassa, idaṃ chaṭṭhaṃ cittaṃ.

‘ ‘ Tatridaṃ sattamaṃ cittaṃ vibhattamāpajjati– ye te, mahārāja, sammāsambuddhā sabbaññuno dasabaladharā catuvesārajjavisāradā aṭṭhārasahi buddhadhammehi samannāgatā anantajinā anāvaraṇañāṇā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sabbattha lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 在那裡，這第七種心來到被分別：大王！

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Sabbattha parisuddhattā.

Api nu kho, mahārāja, nārācassa sudhotassa vimalassa niggaṇṭhissa sukhumadhārassa ajimhassa avaṅkassa akuṭilassa daḷhacāpasamārūḷhassa khomasukhume vā kappāsasukhume vā kambalasukhume vā balavanipātitassa dandhāyitattaṃ vā lagganaṃ vā hotī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante,‘‘ kiṃ kāraṇā’’?

‘‘ Sukhumattā vatthānaṃ sudhotattā nārācassa nipātassa ca balavattā’’ ti , evameva kho, mahārāja, ye te sammāsambuddhā sabbaññuno dasabaladharā catuvesārajjavisāradā aṭṭhārasahi buddhadhammehi samannāgatā anantajinā anāvaraṇañāṇā, tesaṃ taṃ cittaṃ sabbattha lahukaṃ uppajjati lahukaṃ pavattati.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: Kiṃ kāraṇā?
Sabbattha parisuddhattā, idaṃ sattamaṃ cittaṃ.
‘ ‘ Tatra, mahārāja, yadidaṃ sabbaññubuddhānaṃ cittaṃ, taṃ channampi cittānaṃ gaṇanaṃ atikkamitvā asaṅkhyeyyena guṇena parisuddhañca lahukañca.
chinese: 什麼原因呢？

pali: Yasmā ca bhagavato cittaṃ parisuddhañca lahukañca, tasmā, mahārāja, bhagavā yamakapāṭihīraṃ dasseti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yamakapāṭihīre, mahārāja, ñātabbaṃ buddhānaṃ bhagavantānaṃ cittaṃ evaṃ lahuparivattanti, na tattha sakkā uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ vattuṃ, tepi, mahārāja, pāṭihīrā sabbaññubuddhānaṃ cittaṃ upādāya gaṇanampi saṅkhampi kalampi kalabhāgampi na upenti, āvajjanapaṭibaddhaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavato sabbaññutañāṇaṃ, āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānāti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, puriso hatthe ṭhapitaṃ yaṃ kiñci dutiye hatthe ṭhapeyya vivaṭena mukhena vācaṃ nicchāreyya, mukhagataṃ bhojanaṃ gileyya, ummīletvā vā nimīleyya, nimīletvā vā ummīleyya, samiñjitaṃ vā bāhaṃ pasāreyya, pasāritaṃ vā bāhaṃ samiñjeyya, cirataraṃ etaṃ, mahārāja, lahutaraṃ bhagavato sabbaññutañāṇaṃ, lahutaraṃ āvajjanaṃ, āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānāti , āvajjanavikalamattakena na tāvatā buddhā bhagavanto asabbaññuno nāma hontī’’ ti.
chinese: 如男子使放置在一隻手上的任何物品放置到第二隻手上，以開口說話、吞下已到達口中的食物，睜眼後閉眼或閉眼後睜眼，伸直彎曲的手臂或彎曲伸直的手臂，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Āvajjanampi , bhante nāgasena, pariyesanāya kātabbaṃ, iṅgha maṃ tattha kāraṇena saññāpehī’’ ti.
chinese: 這比較久，世尊的一切知智比較急速，貫注比較急速，使之貫注後凡想要的他知道，以貫注缺陷程度，佛、世尊不以那種程度名為非一切知智者。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, purisassa aḍḍhassa mahaddhanassa mahābhogassa pahūtajātarūparajatassa pahūtavittūpakaraṇassa pahūtadhanadhaññassa sālivīhiyavataṇḍulatilamuggamāsapubbaṇṇāparaṇṇasappitelanavanītakhīradadhimadhuguḷaphāṇitā ca khaḷopikumbhipīṭharakoṭṭhabhājanagatā bhaveyyuṃ, tassa ca purisassa pāhunako āgaccheyya bhattāraho bhattābhikaṅkhī, tassa ca gehe yaṃ randhaṃ bhojanaṃ, taṃ pariniṭṭhitaṃ bhaveyya, kumbhito taṇḍule nīharitvā bhojanaṃ randheyya, api ca kho so, mahārāja, tāvatakena bhojanavekallamattakena adhano nāma kapaṇo nāma bhaveyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 如男子是富裕的、大富的、有大財富的、多金銀、多財產資具、多財穀：粳米、米、麥、米粒、芝麻，緣豆、豆、前食、後食、酥、油、生酥、乳、凝乳、蜜、糖、糖蜜，被來到籠、甕、大廣口瓶、庫房、容器，如果那個男子的客人到來，是值得領受食物者，期待食物者，而在他家中凡烹飪的食物全被用完，他從甕中取米粒後烹飪食物。

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, cakkavattirañño gharepi, bhante, akāle bhojanavekallaṃ hoti, kiṃ pana gahapatikassā’’ ti?
chinese: 是否他以暫時食物缺乏(缺陷)的程度名為貧困者，名為貧窮者呢？

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgatassa āvajjanavikalamattakaṃ sabbaññutañāṇaṃ āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānāti.
chinese: 在轉輪王的家中也在非適當時機有食物缺乏，更何況是屋主！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, rukkho assa phalito oṇatavinato piṇḍibhārabharito, na kiñci tattha patitaṃ phalaṃ bhaveyya, api nu kho so, mahārāja, rukkho tāvatakena patitaphalavekallamattakena aphalo nāma bhaveyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 又或如樹已結果實、已向下彎曲、已充滿團簇負荷，在那裡，沒有任何落下的果實，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, patanapaṭibaddhāni tāni rukkhaphalāni, patite yadicchakaṃ labhatī’’ ti.
chinese: 是否那棵樹以暫時落下的果實缺乏的程度名為沒有果實呢？

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgatassa āvajjanapaṭibaddhaṃ sabbaññutañāṇaṃ āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānātī’’ ti.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, āvajjetvā āvajjetvā buddho yadicchakaṃ jānātī’’ ti?
chinese: 如來的一切知智是依靠貫注的，使之貫注後凡想要的他知道。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, bhagavā āvajjetvā āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānātī’’ ti.
chinese: 佛陀一使之貫注後凡想要的他知道？

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, cakkavattī rājā yadā cakkaratanaṃ sarati‘ upetu me cakkaratanan’ ti, sarite cakkaratanaṃ upeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgato āvajjetvā āvajjetvā yadicchakaṃ jānātī’’ ti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Daḷhaṃ, bhante nāgasena, kāraṇaṃ, buddho sabbaññū, sampaṭicchāma buddho sabbaññū’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: Buddhasabbaññubhāvapañho dutiyo.
chinese: 堅固的理由佛陀是一切知者，我們接受佛陀是一切知者。

pali: 3 . Devadattapabbajjapañho
3.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, devadatto kena pabbājito’’ ti?
chinese: 3.提婆達多出家的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘‘ Cha yime, mahārāja, khattiyakumārā bhaddiyo ca anuruddho ca ānando ca bhagu ca kimilo [ kimbilo( sī. pī.) ma. ni.2.166 passitabbaṃ] ca devadatto ca upālikappako sattamo abhisambuddhe satthari sakyakulānandajanane bhagavantaṃ anupabbajantā nikkhamiṃsu, te bhagavā pabbājesī’’ ti.
chinese: 有這六位剎帝利少年：拔提亞、阿那律、阿難、玻古、金毘羅、提婆達多，理髮師優波離為第七位，在大師現正覺、釋迦族歡喜之生起時，他們離開家，跟隨世尊出家，世尊使他們出家。

pali: ‘‘ Nanu, bhante, devadattena pabbajitvā saṅgho bhinno’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, devadattena pabbajitvā saṅgho bhinno, na gihī saṅghaṃ bhindati, na bhikkhunī, na sikkhamānā, na sāmaṇero, na sāmaṇerī saṅghaṃ bhindati, bhikkhu pakatatto samānasaṃvāsako samānasīmāyaṃ ṭhito saṅghaṃ bhindatīti.
chinese: 非比丘尼、非式叉摩那、非沙彌、非沙彌尼分裂僧團。

pali: Saṅghabhedako, bhante, puggalo kiṃ kammaṃ phusatī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Kappaṭṭhitikaṃ, mahārāja, kammaṃ phusatī’’ ti.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kiṃ pana, bhante nāgasena, buddho jānāti‘ devadatto pabbajitvā saṅghaṃ bhindissati, saṅghaṃ bhinditvā kappaṃ niraye paccissatī’’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，佛陀知道：『提婆達多出家後將分裂僧團，僧團分裂後將在地獄被折磨一劫。

pali: ‘‘ Āma, mahārāja, tathāgato jānāti‘ devadatto pabbajitvā saṅghaṃ bhindissati, saṅghaṃ bhinditvā kappaṃ niraye paccissatī’’’ ti.
chinese: 如來知道：『提婆達多出家後將分裂僧團，僧團分裂後將在地獄被折磨一劫。

pali: ‘‘ Yadi, bhante nāgasena, buddho jānāti‘ devadatto pabbajitvā saṅghaṃ bhindissati, saṅghaṃ bhinditvā kappaṃ niraye paccissatī’ ti, tena hi, bhante nāgasena, buddho kāruṇiko anukampako hitesī sabbasattānaṃ ahitaṃ apanetvā hitamupadahatīti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 那樣的話，『佛陀是悲愍者、憐愍者、對一切眾生的利他者，排除無利益的後他供給有利益的。

pali: Yadi taṃ ajānitvā pabbājesi, tena hi buddho asabbaññūti, ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, vijaṭehi etaṃ mahājaṭaṃ, bhinda parāpavādaṃ, anāgate addhāne tayā sadisā buddhimanto bhikkhū dullabhā bhavissanti, ettha tava balaṃ pakāsehī’’ ti.
chinese: 這也是兩難的問題已對你抵達，請你解開這個大結縛，請你打破其他人的指責，在未來世等同你的有覺慧比丘們將是難獲得的，在這裡，請你顯現你的力量。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kāruṇiko, mahārāja, bhagavā sabbaññū ca, kāruññena, mahārāja, bhagavā sabbaññutañāṇena devadattassa gatiṃ olokento addasa devadattaṃ āpāyikaṃ kammaṃ[ aparāpariyakammaṃ( sī. syā. pī.)] āyūhitvā anekāni kappakoṭisatasahassāni nirayena nirayaṃ vinipātena vinipātaṃ gacchantaṃ, taṃ bhagavā sabbaññutañāṇena jānitvā imassa apariyantakataṃ kammaṃ mama sāsane pabbajitassa pariyantakataṃ bhavissati, purimaṃ upādāya pariyantakataṃ dukkhaṃ bhavissati, apabbajitopi ayaṃ moghapuriso kappaṭṭhiyameva kammaṃ āyūhissatīti kāruññena devadattaṃ pabbājesī’’ ti.
chinese: 即使為非出家者，這愚蠢的男子就將執行劫住的業。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tena hi, bhante nāgasena, buddho vadhitvā telena makkheti, papāte pātetvā hatthaṃ deti, māretvā jīvitaṃ pariyesati, yaṃ so paṭhamaṃ dukkhaṃ datvā pacchā sukhaṃ upadahatī’’ ti?
chinese: 使之跌落到斷崖後施與手；

pali: ‘‘ Vadhetipi, mahārāja, tathāgato sattānaṃ hitavasena, pātetipi sattānaṃ hitavasena, māretipi sattānaṃ hitavasena, vadhitvāpi, mahārāja, tathāgato sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati, pātetvāpi sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati, māretvāpi sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati.
chinese: 也因對眾生有利益而使之跌落後供給；

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, mātāpitaro nāma vadhitvāpi pātayitvāpi puttānaṃ hitameva upadahanti, evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgato vadhetipi sattānaṃ hitavasena, pātetipi sattānaṃ hitavasena, māretipi sattānaṃ hitavasena, vadhitvāpi, mahārāja, tathāgato sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati, pātetvāpi sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati, māretvāpi sattānaṃ hitameva upadahati, yena yena yogena sattānaṃ guṇavuḍḍhi hoti, tena tena yogena sabbasattānaṃ hitameva upadahati.
chinese: 也因對眾生有利益而殺害後供給：不管以任何方法有眾生德性的增長，他就以該方法為一切眾生的有利益而供給。

pali: Sace, mahārāja, devadatto na pabbājeyya, gihibhūto samāno nirayasaṃvattanikaṃ bahuṃ pāpakammaṃ katvā anekāni kappakoṭisatasahassāni nirayena nirayaṃ vinipātena vinipātaṃ gacchanto bahuṃ dukkhaṃ vedayissati, taṃ bhagavā jānamāno kāruññena devadattaṃ pabbājesi,‘ mama sāsane pabbajitassa dukkhaṃ pariyantakataṃ bhavissatī’ ti kāruññena garukaṃ dukkhaṃ lahukaṃ akāsi.
chinese: 當世尊知道那個時，他以悲愍使提婆達多出家：『在我的教誡中為出家者，苦將會成為作邊界的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā, mahārāja, dhanayasasiriñātibalena balavā puriso attano ñātiṃ vā mittaṃ vā raññā garukaṃ daṇḍaṃ dhārentaṃ attano bahuvissatthabhāvena samatthatāya garukaṃ daṇḍaṃ lahukaṃ akāsi, evameva kho, mahārāja, bhagavā bahūni kappakoṭisatasahassāni dukkhaṃ vedayamānaṃ devadattaṃ pabbājetvā sīlasamādhipaññāvimuttibalasamatthabhāvena garukaṃ dukkhaṃ lahukaṃ akāsi.
chinese: 世尊使感受許多百千俱胝劫苦的提婆達多出家後，以戒、定、慧、解脫力之能力性，他轉重的苦為輕的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, kusalo bhisakko sallakatto garukaṃ rogaṃ balavosadhabalena lahukaṃ karoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, bahūni kappakoṭisatasahassāni dukkhaṃ vedayamānaṃ devadattaṃ bhagavā rogaññutāya pabbājetvā kāruññabalo patthaddhadhammosadhabalena garukaṃ dukkhaṃ lahukaṃ akāsi.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Api nu kho so, mahārāja, bhagavā bahuvedanīyaṃ devadattaṃ appavedanīyaṃ karonto kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjeyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 是否世尊轉許多應該被提婆達多感受的為少應該被感受的，他會來到任何非福德呢？

pali: ‘‘ Na kiñci, bhante, apuññaṃ āpajjeyya antamaso gaddūhanamattampī’’ ti.
chinese: 不會來到任何非福德，甚至連擠牛奶時拉一次奶頭那樣短的時間。

pali: ‘‘ Imampi kho, mahārāja, kāraṇaṃ atthato sampaṭiccha, yena kāraṇena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi.
chinese: 你從義理接受這個理由，以該理由世尊使提婆達多出家。

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi , mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi, yena kāraṇena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi.
chinese: 請你也聽更進一步的理由，以該理由世尊使提婆達多出家。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, coraṃ āgucāriṃ gahetvā rañño dasseyyuṃ,‘ ayaṃ kho, deva, coro āgucārī, imassa yaṃ icchasi, taṃ daṇḍaṃ paṇehī’ ti.
chinese: 這位是盜賊、罪犯，請你對這位判決凡你想要的那個處罰。

pali: Tamenaṃ rājā evaṃ vadeyya‘ tena hi , bhaṇe, imaṃ coraṃ bahinagaraṃ nīharitvā āghātane sīsaṃ chindathā’’ ti,‘ evaṃ devā’ ti kho te rañño paṭissutvā taṃ bahinagaraṃ nīharitvā āghātanaṃ nayeyyuṃ.
chinese: 』他們回答國王後，帶他到城外後帶到斬首台。

pali: Tamenaṃ passeyya kocideva puriso rañño santikā laddhavaro laddhayasadhanabhogo ādeyyavacano balavicchitakārī, so tassa kāruññaṃ katvā te purise evaṃ vadeyya‘ alaṃ, bho, kiṃ tumhākaṃ imassa sīsacchedanena, tena hi bho imassa hatthaṃ vā pādaṃ vā chinditvā jīvitaṃ rakkhatha, ahametassa kāraṇā rañño santike paṭivacanaṃ karissāmī’ ti.
chinese: 請你們切斷這位的手或腳後保護生命，我在國王面前將以這個理由作回答。

pali: Te tassa balavato vacanena tassa corassa hatthaṃ vā pādaṃ vā chinditvā jīvitaṃ rakkheyyuṃ.
chinese: 』他們以他的強力言語切斷那個盜賊的手或腳後會守護生命。

pali: Api nu kho so, mahārāja, puriso evaṃ kārī tassa corassa kiccakārī assā’’ ti?
chinese: 是否那位男子這麼做，會是對那位盜賊盡義務者呢？

pali: ‘‘ Jīvitadāyako so, bhante, puriso tassa corassa, jīvite dinne kiṃ tassa akataṃ nāma atthī’’ ti?
chinese: 那位男子是那位盜賊生命的施與者，當施與生命時，有什麼所謂他所未作的呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yā pana hatthapādacchedane vedanā, so tāya vedanāya kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjeyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「那麼，凡在被切斷手腳時的感受，他以那個感受會來到任何非福德嗎？

pali: ‘‘ Attano katena so, bhante, coro dukkhavedanaṃ vedayati, jīvitadāyako pana puriso na kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjeyyā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, bhagavā kāruññena devadattaṃ pabbājesi‘ mama sāsane pabbajitassa dukkhaṃ pariyantakataṃ bhavissatī’ ti.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: Pariyantakatañca, mahārāja, devadattassa dukkhaṃ, devadatto, mahārāja, maraṇakāle–
chinese: 』大王！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Imehi aṭṭhīhi tamaggapuggalaṃ, devātidevaṃ naradammasārathiṃ;
chinese: 提婆達多死時：

pali: Samantacakkhuṃ satapuññalakkhaṇaṃ, pāṇehi buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ upemī’ ti.
chinese: 『八種人中最高者，天中天、應該被調伏人的調御者，

pali: ‘ ‘ Pāṇupetaṃ saraṇamagamāsi.
chinese: 一切眼者、百福相者，我以生命歸依佛。

pali: Devadatto, mahārāja, cha koṭṭhāse kate kappe atikkante paṭhamakoṭṭhāse saṅghaṃ bhindi, pañca koṭṭhāse niraye paccitvā tato muccitvā aṭṭhissaro nāma paccekabuddho bhavissati.
chinese: 提婆達多在一劫作六部份之第一部分已過時分裂僧團，在[其後的]五部分於地獄被折磨，從那裡被釋出後將成為名叫阿提沙羅的辟支佛。

pali: Api nu kho so, mahārāja, bhagavā evaṃ kārī devadattassa kiccakārī assā’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Sabbadado, bhante nāgasena, tathāgato devadattassa, yaṃ tathāgato devadattaṃ paccekabodhiṃ pāpessati, kiṃ tathāgatena devadattassa akataṃ nāma atthī’’ ti?
chinese: 如來對提婆達多是一切施與者：凡如來將使提婆達多得到辟支菩提(獨覺)，對提婆達多有什麼所謂未被如來作的呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yaṃ pana, mahārāja, devadatto saṅghaṃ bhinditvā niraye dukkhavedanaṃ vedayati, api nu kho bhagavā tatonidānaṃ kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjeyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 那麼，凡提婆達多分裂僧團後，在地獄感受苦的感受，是否世尊從那個因由會來到任何非福德呢？

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, attanā katena, bhante, devadatto kappaṃ niraye paccati, dukkhapariyantakārako satthā na kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjatī’’ ti.
chinese: 提婆達多以自己所作在地獄被折磨，是作邊界的者，大師不來到任何非福德。

pali: ‘‘ Imampi kho, tvaṃ mahārāja, kāraṇaṃ atthato sampaṭiccha, yena kāraṇena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi.
chinese: 你從義理接受這個理由，以該理由世尊使提婆達多出家。

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi, yena kāraṇena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi .
chinese: 請你也聽更進一步的理由，以該理由世尊使提婆達多出家。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, kusalo bhisakko sallakatto vātapittasemhasannipātautupariṇāmavisamaparihāraopakkamikopakkantaṃ pūtikuṇapaduggandhābhisañchannaṃ antosallaṃ susiragataṃ pubbaruhirasampuṇṇaṃ vaṇaṃ vūpasamento vaṇamukhaṃ kakkhaḷatikhiṇakhārakaṭukena bhesajjena anulimpati paripaccanāya, paripaccitvā mudubhāvamupagataṃ satthena vikantayitvā ḍahati salākāya, daḍḍhe khāralavaṇaṃ deti, bhesajjena anulimpati vaṇaruhanāya byādhitassa sotthibhāvamanuppattiyā, api nu kho so, mahārāja, bhisakko sallakatto ahitacitto bhesajjena anulimpati, satthena vikanteti, ḍahati salākāya, khāralavaṇaṃ detī’’ ti?
chinese: 是否那位醫師、外科醫生以無利益的心塗抹藥物、以刀切開、以木片燒、給與鹼性洗滌液呢？

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, hitacitto sotthikāmo tāni kiriyāni karotī’’ ti.
chinese: 這確實不是。

pali: ‘‘ Yā panassa bhesajjakiriyākaraṇena uppannā dukkhavedanā, tatonidānaṃ so bhisakko sallakatto kiñci apuññaṃ āpajjeyyā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「凡對他以藥物所作行為所生起的苦的感受，從那個因由那位醫師、外科醫生會來到任何非福德呢？

pali: ‘‘ Hitacitto, bhante, sotthikāmo bhisakko sallakatto tāni kiriyāni karoti, kiṃ so tatonidānaṃ apuññaṃ āpajjeyya, saggagāmī so, bhante, bhisakko sallakatto’’ ti.
chinese: 醫師、外科醫生是有利益心者、想要安穩者，他做那些應該被做的，為何從那個因由他會來到任何非福德呢？

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, kāruññena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi dukkhaparimuttiyā.
chinese: 大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Aparampi, mahārāja, uttariṃ kāraṇaṃ suṇohi, yena kāraṇena bhagavā devadattaṃ pabbājesi.
chinese: 世尊以悲愍使提婆達多為了苦的解脫出家。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, puriso kaṇṭakena viddho assa, athaññataro puriso tassa hitakāmo sotthikāmo tiṇhena kaṇṭakenavā satthamukhena vā samantato chinditvā paggharantena lohitena taṃ kaṇṭakaṃ nīhareyya, api nu kho so, mahārāja, puriso ahitakāmo taṃ kaṇṭakaṃ nīharatī’’ ti?
chinese: 如男子被刺貫穿，那時，某個對他有利益、想要安穩男子以銳利的刺或刀口從周圍切開後，會以血流出時除去那個刺，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante, hitakāmo so, bhante, puriso sotthikāmo taṃ kaṇṭakaṃ nīharati.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: Sace so, bhante, taṃ kaṇṭakaṃ na nīhareyya, maraṇaṃ vā so tena pāpuṇeyya maraṇamattaṃ vā dukkhan’’ ti.
chinese: 大德！

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, tathāgato kāruññena devadattaṃ pabbājesi dukkhaparimuttiyā.
chinese: 如果他不除去那個刺，他以那個到達死亡，或死亡程度的苦。
