chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Kuṭṭamūlañca nissāya, ālopaṃ taṃ abhuñjisaṃ;
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Bhuñjamāne vā bhutte vā, jegucchaṃ me na vijjatī’ ti.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, jarasiṅgālo bhojanaṃ paṭilabhitvā na vicināti lūkhaṃ vā paṇītaṃ vāti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena bhojanaṃ paṭilabhitvā na vicinitabbaṃ‘ lūkhaṃ vā paṇītaṃ vā sampannaṃ vā asampannaṃ vā’ ti, yathāladdhena santussitabbaṃ.
chinese: 『還有應該以粗弊的知足，不應該欲求其它多味的，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, jarasiṅgālassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 在諸味上隨貪求者的意，在禪上不喜樂，[Thag.86, 580偈]

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena upasenena vaṅgantaputtena–
‘ ‘‘ Lūkhenapi ca santusse, nāññaṃ patthe rasaṃ bahuṃ;
chinese: 7.鹿支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Rasesu anugiddhassa, jhāne na ramate[ ramatī( sī. pī.)] mano;
chinese: 凡你說：『鹿的三支應該被把握。

pali: Itarītarena santuṭṭho[ santuṭṭhe( sī. pī.)], sāmaññaṃ paripūratī’’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Jarasiṅgālaṅgapañho chaṭṭho.
chinese: 如鹿白天行走於林野，夜間於露地(露天)。

pali: 7 . Migaṅgapañho
7.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ migassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, migo divā araññe carati, rattiṃ abbhokāse, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena divā araññe viharitabbaṃ, rattiṃ abbhokāse.
chinese: 『舍利弗！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, migassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 凡那些寒冷的冬夜，[冬月的]第八天前後下雪期，在像那樣的夜晚，夜晚我住在屋外，白天住在叢林；

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena lomahaṃsanapariyāye–
chinese: 在夏季最後一個月，白天我住在屋外，夜晚住在叢林。

pali: ‘ So kho ahaṃ, sāriputta, yā tā rattiyo sītā hemantikā antaraṭṭhakā himapātasamayā[ antaraṭṭhake himapātasamaye( sī. pī. ka.)], tathārūpāsu rattīsu rattiṃ abbhokāse viharāmi, divā vanasaṇḍe.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，當污染落下時應該被逃避、應該被逃走，心不應該被給與。

pali: Gimhānaṃ pacchime māse divā abbhokāse viharāmi, rattiṃ vanasaṇḍe’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, migo sattimhi vā sare vā opatante vañceti[ vajjeti( ka.)] palāyati, na kāyamupaneti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena kilesesu opatantesu vañcayitabbaṃ[ vajjayitabbaṃ( ka.)] palāyitabbaṃ, na cittamupanetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他看見慣習爭論-爭吵-爭執-爭辯、破戒者、懈怠者、樂於聚會者後應該被避往他處：『不要他們看見我，且不要我看見他們。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, migassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, migo manusse disvā yena vā tena vā palāyati‘ mā maṃ te addasaṃsū’ ti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena bhaṇḍanakalahaviggahavivādasīle dussīle kusīte saṅgaṇikārāme disvā yena vā tena vā palāyitabbaṃ‘ mā maṃ te addasaṃsu, ahañca te mā addasan’ ti.
Idaṃ, mahārāja, migassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 鹿支的問題第七。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 8.「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Mā me kadāci pāpiccho, kusīto hīnavīriyo;
chinese: 』什麼是那四支應該被把握呢？

pali: Appassuto anācāro, sammato[ sameto( sī. pī.)] ahu katthacī’’’ ti.
chinese: 如公牛不捨棄自己的家屋。

pali: Migaṅgapañho sattamo.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: 8 . Gorūpaṅgapañho
8.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ gorūpassa cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，自己的身體不應該被捨棄：『這個身體是無常、塗身、按摩-破壞-分散法[SN.35.103]。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, gorūpo sakaṃ gehaṃ na vijahati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sako kāyo na vijahitabbo‘ aniccucchādanaparimaddanabhedanavikiraṇaviddhaṃsanadhammo ayaṃ kāyo’ ti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他是拿起梵行者，以苦樂直到生命耗盡、臨終為止，梵行都應該被實行。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpo ādinnadhuro sukhadukkhena dhuraṃ vahati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ādinnabrahmacariyena sukhadukkhena yāva jīvitapariyādānā āpāṇakoṭikaṃ brahmacariyaṃ caritabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，被阿闍梨和尚教誡，以意欲、情愛、淨信，當受苦時應該被接受。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpo chandena ghāyamāno pānīyaṃ pivati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ācariyupajjhāyānaṃ anusiṭṭhi chandena pemena pasādena ghāyamānena paṭiggahetabbā.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，對上座、新學、中臘比丘、在家優婆塞的告誡、教誡，他應該被以低頭接受。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpo yena kenaci vāhiyamāno vahati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena theranavamajjhimabhikkhūnampi gihiupāsakassāpi ovādānusāsanī sirasā sampaṭicchitabbā.
chinese: 如果他也教誡我，我低頭接受。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, gorūpassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 強烈的意欲與情愛：在那位出現時看見後，

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
‘ ‘‘ Tadahu pabbajito santo, jātiyā sattavassiko;
chinese: 9.野豬支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Sopi maṃ anusāseyya, sampaṭicchāmi matthake[ muddhanā( sī.)].
chinese: 凡你說：『野豬的二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Tibbaṃ chandañca pemañca, tasmiṃ disvā upaṭṭhape;
chinese: 』什麼是那二支應該被把握呢？

pali: Ṭhapeyyācariyaṭṭhāne , sakkacca naṃ punappunan’’’ ti.
chinese: 如野豬在熱惱、炎熱的夏天時期到達時走入水。

pali: Gorūpaṅgapañho aṭṭhamo.
9 . Varāhaṅgapañho
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: 9.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ varāhassa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，在被瞋心攪動、絆倒、迷亂、熱惱時，清涼的、甘露的、勝妙的慈之修習應該被走入。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, varāho santattakaṭhite[ santattakaṭhine( sī. pī.)] gimhasamaye sampatte udakaṃ upagacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena dosena citte āluḷitakhalitavibbhantasantatte sītalāmatapaṇītamettābhāvanaṃ upagantabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，放置身於心意中後，應該被來到所緣內躺臥。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, varāhassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是野豬的第二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, varāho cikkhallamudakamupagantvā nāsikāya pathaviṃ khaṇitvā doṇiṃ katvā doṇikāya sayati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena mānase kāyaṃ nikkhipitvā ārammaṇantaragatena sayitabbaṃ.
chinese: 10.象支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, varāhassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 10.「那先大德！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena piṇḍolabhāradvājena–
chinese: 』什麼是那五支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Kāye[ kāyena( ka.)] sabhāvaṃ disvāna, vicinitvā vipassako;
chinese: 就如當象行走時，地就破裂。

pali: Ekākiyo adutiyo, seti ārammaṇantare’’’ ti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Varāhaṅgapañho navamo.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，當只觸知身時，一切污染應該被破裂。

pali: 10 . Hatthiṅgapañho
10.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ hatthissa pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 象就以注意一切身，只端直地觀看，不看四面八方。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, hatthī nāma caranto yeva pathaviṃ dāleti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena kāyaṃ sammasamāneneva sabbe kilesā dāletabbā.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為注意一切身者，四面八方不應該被看，上方的不應該被仰視，下方的不應該被俯視，應該被成為僅一尋(六尺)遠的觀看者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, hatthissa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, hatthī sabbakāyeneva apaloketi, ujukaṃ yeva pekkhati, na disāvidisā viloketi, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sabbakāyena apalokinā bhavitabbaṃ, na disāvidisā viloketabbā, na uddhaṃ ulloketabbaṃ, na adho oloketabbaṃ, yugamattapekkhinā bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為無固定臥所者，應該被無窟宅地為了托鉢行走。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, hatthissa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, hatthī anibaddhasayano gocarāyamanugantvā na tameva desaṃ vāsatthamupagacchati, na dhuvappatiṭṭhālayo, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena anibaddhasayanena bhavitabbaṃ, nirālayena piṇḍāya gantabbaṃ, yadi passati vipassako manuññaṃ patirūpaṃ ruciradese bhavaṃ maṇḍapaṃ vā rukkhamūlaṃ vā guhaṃ vā pabbhāraṃ vā, tattheva vāsamupagantabbaṃ, dhuvappatiṭṭhālayo na kātabbo.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, hatthissa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, hatthī udakaṃ ogāhitvā sucivimalasītalasalilaparipuṇṇaṃ kumuduppalapadumapuṇḍarīkasañchannaṃ mahatimahantaṃ padumasaraṃ ogāhitvā kīḷati gajavarakīḷaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sucivimalavippasannamanāviladhammavaravāripuṇṇaṃ vimuttikusumasañchannaṃ mahāsatipaṭṭhānapokkharaṇiṃ ogāhitvā ñāṇena saṅkhārā odhunitabbā vidhunitabbā, yogāvacarakīḷā kīḷitabbā.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，腳應該被具念地、正知地抬起，腳應該被具念地、正知地放下，在前進退後時，在屈伸時，在一切處都應該被成為具念、正知者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, hatthissa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, hatthī sato pādaṃ uddharati, sato pādaṃ nikkhipati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena satena sampajānena pādaṃ uddharitabbaṃ, satena sampajānena pādaṃ nikkhipitabbaṃ, abhikkamapaṭikkame samiñjanapasāraṇe sabbattha satena sampajānena bhavitabbaṃ.
Idaṃ, mahārāja, hatthissa pañcamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 其攝頌：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena saṃyuttanikāyavare–
chinese: 鼬鼠、老狐狼、鹿，公牛、野豬、象十則。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Kāyena saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu vācāya saṃvaro;
Manasā saṃvaro sādhu, sādhu sabbattha saṃvaro;
Sabbattha saṃvuto lajjī, rakkhitoti pavuccatī’’’ ti.
Hatthiṅgapañho dasamo.
Upacikāvaggo catuttho.
Tassuddānaṃ –
Upacikā biḷāro ca, undūro vicchikena ca;
Nakulo siṅgālo migo,
Gorūpo varāho hatthinā dasāti.
5 . Sīhavaggo
chinese: 5.獅子品 [目錄]

pali: 1 . Sīhaṅgapañho
1.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ sīhassa satta aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni satta aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 』什麼是那七支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, sīho nāma setavimalaparisuddhapaṇḍaro, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena setavimalaparisuddhapaṇḍaracittena byapagatakukkuccena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，以白的、無垢的、遍純淨的、黃白的心應該被成為離開後悔者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sīho catucaraṇo vikkantacārī, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena caturiddhipādacaraṇena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為神足行者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是獅子的第二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sīho abhirūparucirakesarī, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena abhirūparucirasīlakesarinā bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為殊妙、美麗的戒鬃毛者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是獅子的第三支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sīho jīvitapariyādānepi na kassaci onamati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānapaccayabhesajjaparikkhārapariyādānepi na kassaci onamitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，即使衣服、施食、住處、病人的需要物、醫藥必需品耗盡也不應該被對誰彎腰。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是獅子的第四支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sīho sapadānabhakkho yasmiṃ okāse nipatati, tattheva yāvadatthaṃ bhakkhayati, na varamaṃsaṃ vicināti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sapadānabhakkhena bhavitabbaṃ, na kulāni vicinitabbāni, na pubbagehaṃ hitvā kulāni upasaṅkamitabbāni, na bhojanaṃ vicinitabbaṃ, yasmiṃ okāse kabaḷaṃ ādīyati, tasmiṃ yeva okāse bhuñjitabbaṃ sarīrayāpanatthaṃ[ sarīrayāpanamattaṃ( sī. pī.)], na varabhojanaṃ vicinitabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa pañcamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sīho asannidhibhakkho, sakiṃ gocaraṃ bhakkhayitvā na puna taṃ upagacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena asannidhikāraparibhoginā bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是獅子的第六支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa chaṭṭhaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ , mahārāja, sīho bhojanaṃ aladdhā na paritassati, laddhāpi bhojanaṃ agadhito[ agathito( sī.)] amucchito anajjhosanno paribhuñjati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena bhojanaṃ aladdhā na paritassitabbaṃ, laddhāpi bhojanaṃ agadhitena amucchitena anajjhosannena ādīnavadassāvinā nissaraṇapaññena paribhuñjitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在殊勝相應部中稱讚大迦葉上座時說：

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sīhassa sattamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 『比丘們！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena saṃyuttanikāyavare theraṃ mahākassapaṃ parikittayamānena–

‘ Santuṭṭhoyaṃ, bhikkhave, kassapo itarītarena piṇḍapātena, itarītarapiṇḍapātasantuṭṭhiyā ca vaṇṇavādī, na ca piṇḍapātahetu anesanaṃ appatirūpaṃ āpajjati, aladdhā ca piṇḍapātaṃ na paritassati, laddhā ca piṇḍapātaṃ agadhito amucchito anajjhosanno ādīnavadassāvī nissaraṇapañño paribhuñjatī’’’ ti.
chinese: 凡你說：『紅雁的三支應該被把握。

pali: Sīhaṅgapañho paṭhamo.
2 . Cakkavākaṅgapañho
chinese: 』什麼是那三支應該被把握呢？

pali: 2.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ cakkavākassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānīti’’?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, cakkavāko yāva jīvitapariyādānā dutiyikaṃ na vijahati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena yāva jīvitapariyādānā yoniso manasikāro na vijahitabbo.
chinese: 紅雁是以苔蘚、水藻為食者，且以那個來到滿足，而從那個滿足，以力量與以容色不衰退。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, cakkavākassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, cakkavāko sevālapaṇakabhakkho, tena ca santuṭṭhiṃ āpajjati, tāya ca santuṭṭhiyā balena ca vaṇṇena ca na parihāyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena yathālābhasantoso karaṇīyo, yathālābhasantuṭṭho kho, mahārāja, yogī yogāvacaro na parihāyati sīlena, na parihāyati samādhinā, na parihāyati paññāya, na parihāyati vimuttiyā, na parihāyati vimuttiñāṇadassanena, na parihāyati sabbehi kusalehi dhammehi.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為已捨離棍棒者、已捨離刀劍者、有羞恥者、來到同情者、對一切活的生命類有憐愍的[DN.1, 8段]。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, cakkavākassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, cakkavāko pāṇe na viheṭhayati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena nihitadaṇḍena nihitasatthena lajjinā dayāpannena sabbapāṇabhūtahitānukampinā bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 『凡不殺不使他殺，不打勝不使他打勝者，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, cakkavākassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 在一切生類上他有慈，無論因誰對他都沒有敵意。

pali: Bhāsatampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena cakkavākajātake–
chinese: 紅雁支的問題第二。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Yo na hanti na ghāteti, na jināti na jāpaye;
chinese: 3.貝那希葛鳥支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Mettaṃso [ ahiṃsā( sī. pī.)] sabbabhūtesu, veraṃ tassa na kenacī’’’ ti.
chinese: 凡你說：『貝那希葛鳥的二支應該被把握。

pali: Cakkavākaṅgapañho dutiyo.
chinese: 』什麼是那二支應該被把握呢？

pali: 3 . Peṇāhikaṅgapañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 3.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ peṇāhikāya dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, peṇāhikā sakapatimhi usūyāya chāpake na posayati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sakamane[ sakamano( ka.)] kilese uppanne usūyāyitabbaṃ, satipaṭṭhānena sammāsaṃvarasusire pakkhipitvā manodvāre kāyagatāsati bhāvetabbā.
chinese: 貝那希葛鳥白天行於荒林中食物處後，傍晚以保護自己來到鳥群。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, peṇāhikāya paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, peṇāhikā pavane divasaṃ gocaraṃ caritvā sāyaṃ pakkhigaṇaṃ upeti attano guttiyā, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ekakena pavivekaṃ sevitabbaṃ saṃyojanaparimuttiyā, tatra ratiṃ alabhamānena upavādabhayaparirakkhaṇāya saṅghaṃ osaritvā saṅgharakkhitena vasitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被梵王娑婆主在世尊的面前說：

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, peṇāhikāya dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 『能依從邊地臥坐處，能為了結的解脫而行，

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, brahmunā sahampatinā bhagavato santike–
chinese: 如果在那裡不能獲得喜樂，應該居住在僧團中自我守護、有念的。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Sevetha pantāni senāsanāni, careyya saṃyojanavippamokkhā;
chinese: 貝那希葛鳥支的問題第三。

pali: Sace ratiṃ nādhigaccheyya tattha, saṅghe vase rakkhitatto satīmā’’’ ti.
chinese: 4.「那先大德！

pali: Peṇāhikaṅgapañho tatiyo.
chinese: 凡你說：『家鴿的一支應該被把握。

pali: 4 . Gharakapotaṅgapañho
chinese: 』什麼是那一支應該被把握呢？

pali: 4.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ gharakapotassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 如當家鴿住在他人家屋時，不捉取他們的任何物品之相，為無關心者，住眾多[鳥]想。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, gharakapoto paragehe vasamāno na tesaṃ kiñci bhaṇḍassa nimittaṃ gaṇhāti, majjhatto vasati saññābahulo, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena parakulaṃ upagatena tasmiṃ kule itthīnaṃ vā purisānaṃ vā mañce vā pīṭhe vā vatthe vā alaṅkāre vā upabhoge vā paribhoge vā bhojanavikatīsu vā na nimittaṃ gahetabbaṃ, majjhattena bhavitabbaṃ, samaṇasaññā paccupaṭṭhapetabbā.
chinese: 這是家鴿的一支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, gharakapotassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在小那羅陀本生經中說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena cūḷanāradajātake–
chinese: 『進入他人家屋後，為了飲料或食物，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Pavisitvā parakulaṃ, pānatthaṃ bhojanāya vā[ pānesu bhojanesu vā( sī. pī.)];
Mitaṃ khāde mitaṃ bhuñje, na ca rūpe manaṃ kare’’’ ti.
chinese: 家鴿支的問題第四。

pali: Gharakapotaṅgapañho catuttho.
chinese: 5.貓頭鷹支的問題 [目錄]

pali: 5 . Ulūkaṅgapañho
chinese: 5.「那先大德！

pali: 5.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ ulūkassa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, ulūko kākehi paṭiviruddho, rattiṃ kākasaṅghaṃ gantvā bahūpi kāke hanati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena aññāṇena paṭiviruddho kātabbo, ekena raho nisīditvā aññāṇaṃ sampamadditabbaṃ, mūlato chinditabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, ulūkassa paṭhamaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, ulūko suppaṭisallīno hoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena paṭisallānārāmena bhavitabbaṃ paṭisallānaratena.
chinese: 這是貓頭鷹的第二支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, ulūkassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在殊勝相應部中說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena saṃyuttanikāyavare–
chinese: 『比丘們！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu paṭisallānārāmo paṭisallānarato‘‘ idaṃ dukkhan’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti,‘‘ ayaṃ dukkhasamudayo’’ ti yathā bhūthaṃ pajānāti ,‘‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodho’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti,‘‘ ayaṃ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’’ ti yathābhūtaṃ pajānātī’’’ ti.
chinese: 貓頭鷹支的問題第五。

pali: Ulūkaṅgapañho pañcamo.
chinese: 6.啄木鳥支的問題 [目錄]

pali: 6 . Satapattaṅgapañho
chinese: 6.「那先大德！

pali: 6.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ satapattassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, satapatto ravitvā paresaṃ khemaṃ vā bhayaṃ vā ācikkhati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena paresaṃ dhammaṃ desayamānena vinipātaṃ bhayato dassayitabbaṃ, nibbānaṃ khemato dassayitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是啄木鳥的一支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, satapattassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被賓頭盧婆羅墮若上座說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena piṇḍolabhāradvājena–
chinese: 『在地獄中有恐怖、畏懼，在涅槃中有廣大的樂，這兩者的意理應該被瑜伽者教導。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Niraye bhayasantāsaṃ, nibbāne vipulaṃ sukhaṃ;
Ubhayānetānatthāni dassetabbāni yoginā’’’ ti.
chinese: 啄木鳥支的問題第六。

pali: Satapattaṅgapañho chaṭṭho.
chinese: 7.蝙蝠支的問題 [目錄]

pali: 7 . Vagguliṅgapañho
chinese: 7.「那先大德！

pali: 7.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ vaggulissa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, vagguli gehaṃ pavisitvā vicaritvā nikkhamati, na tattha palibuddhati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisitvā sapadānaṃ vicaritvā paṭiladdhalābhena khippameva nikkhamitabbaṃ, na tattha palibuddhena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是蝙蝠的第一支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, vaggulissa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 當蝙蝠住留在他人家屋時，對他們不作損減。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, vagguli paragehe vasamāno na tesaṃ parihāniṃ karoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena kulāni upasaṅkamitvā atiyācanāya vā viññattibahulatāya vā kāyadosabahulatāya vā atibhāṇitāya vā samānasukhadukkhatāya vā na tesaṃ koci vippaṭisāro karaṇīyo, napi tesaṃ mūlakammaṃ parihāpetabbaṃ, sabbathā vaḍḍhi yeva icchitabbā.
chinese: 這是蝙蝠的第二支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, vaggulissa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在殊勝長部相經中說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena dīghanikāyavare lakkhaṇasuttante–
chinese: 『信、戒、所聞、覺慧，施捨、法、許多好的，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Suddhāya sīlena sutena buddhiyā, cāgena dhammena bahūhi sādhuhi;
chinese: 親族、朋友、親屬，與力量、容色、樂兩者，

pali: Dhanena dhaññena ca khettavatthunā, puttehi dārehi catuppadehi ca.
chinese: 希求如何來到令他們不減損，這位期待成功者。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Ñātīhi mittehi ca bandhavehi, balena vaṇṇena sukhena cūbhayaṃ;
chinese: 蝙蝠支的問題第七。

pali: Kathaṃ na hāyeyyuṃ pareti icchati, atthasamiddhiñca panābhikaṅkhatī’’’ ti.
chinese: 8.「那先大德！

pali: Vagguliṅgapañho sattamo.
chinese: 凡你說：『水蛭的一支應該被把握。

pali: 8 . Jalūkaṅgapañho
8.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ jalūkāya ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, jalūkā yattha allīyati, tattheva daḷhaṃ allīyitvā ruhiraṃ pivati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena yasmiṃ ārammaṇe cittaṃ allīyati, taṃ ārammaṇaṃ vaṇṇato ca saṇṭhānato ca disato ca okāsato ca paricchedato ca liṅgato ca nimittato ca daḷhaṃ patiṭṭhāpetvā tenevārammaṇena vimuttirasamasecanakaṃ pātabbaṃ.
chinese: 『以遍純淨的心，在所緣上住立後，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, jalūkāya ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 應該被那個心喝飲，美味的解脫汁。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena anuruddhena–
chinese: 水蛭支的問題第八。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Parisuddhena cittena, ārammaṇe patiṭṭhāya;
chinese: 9.「那先大德！

pali: Tena cittena pātabbaṃ, vimuttirasamasecanan’’’ ti.
chinese: 凡你說：『蛇的三支應該被把握。

pali: Jalūkaṅgapañho aṭṭhamo.
chinese: 』什麼是那三支應該被把握呢？

pali: 9 . Sappaṅgapañho
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 9.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ sappassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, sappo urena gacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena paññāya caritabbaṃ, paññāya caramānassa kho, mahārāja, yogino cittaṃ ñāye carati, vilakkhaṇaṃ vivajjeti, salakkhaṇaṃ bhāveti.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，避開著惡行應該被行。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja , sappassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是蛇的第二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sappo caramāno osadhaṃ parivajjento carati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena duccaritaṃ parivajjentena caritabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sappassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，尋思惡尋後，使不喜樂生起後，應該被苦惱，應該被憂愁，應該被思慮：『日子被我以放逸度過，它不能被復得。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, sappo manusse disvā tappati[ manussaṃ disvā kampati( ka.)] socati cintayati, evameva kho mahārāja yoginā yogāvacarena kuvitakke, vitakketvā aratiṃ uppādayitvā tappitabbaṃ socitabbaṃ cintayitabbaṃ‘ pamādena me divaso vītināmito, na so puna sakkā laddhun’ ti.
chinese: 凡那一夜(斯里蘭卡版)我不願意地離家而住，[卻]互相憶念著，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, sappassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 那一夜惱苦著，我們憂愁：「那夜將不復存在。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā bhallāṭiyajātake dvinnaṃ kinnarānaṃ–
chinese: 10.蟒蛇支的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Mayekarattaṃ [ yamekarattiṃ( sī. pī.)] vippavasimha ludda, akāmakā aññamaññaṃ sarantā;
chinese: 凡你說：『蟒蛇的一支應該被把握。

pali: Tamekarattaṃ [ tamekarattiṃ( sī. pī.)] anutappamānā, socāma‘ sā ratti puna nahessatī’’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Sappaṅgapañho navamo.
chinese: 如蟒蛇大的大身體多日空的胃是非常悲慘的，滿肚子沒得到食物，未填滿者最多為了以身體的生存程度維持生活。

pali: 10 . Ajagaraṅgapañho
10.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ ajagarassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, ajagaro mahatimahākāyo bahūpi divase ūnūdaro dīnataro kucchipūraṃ āhāraṃ na labhati, aparipuṇṇo yeva yāvadeva sarīrayāpanamattakena yāpeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yogino yogāvacarassa bhikkhācariyappasutassa parapiṇḍamupagatassa paradinnappāṭikaṅkhissa sayaṃgāhappaṭiviratassa dullabhaṃ udaraparipūraṃ āhāraṃ, api ca atthavasikena kulaputtena cattāro pañca ālope abhuñjitvā avasesaṃ udakena paripūretabbaṃ.
chinese: 自我努力的比丘有，足夠的安樂住。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, ajagarassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 獅子品第五。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Allaṃ sukkhaṃ vā bhuñjanto, na bāḷhaṃ suhito siyā;
chinese: 「獅子與紅雁，鳥、家鴿，

pali: Ūnūdaro mitāhāro, sato bhikkhu paribbaje.
chinese: 貓頭鷹與啄木鳥，蝙蝠與水蛭，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Cattāro pañca ālope, abhutvā udakaṃ pive;
chinese: 蛇與蟒蛇，以那樣被說為品。

pali: Alaṃ phāsu vihārāya, pahitattassa bhikkhuno’’’ ti.
Ajagaraṅgapañho dasamo.
Sīhavaggo pañcamo.
Tassuddānaṃ –
Kesarī cakkavāko ca, peṇāhi gharakapotako;
Ulūko satapatto ca, vagguli ca jalūpikā;
Sappo ajagaro ceva, vaggo tena pavuccatīti.
6 . Makkaṭakavaggo
chinese: 6.猴子品 [目錄]

pali: 1 . Panthamakkaṭakaṅgapañho
chinese: 1.路上待獵物蜘蛛支的問題

pali: 1.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ panthamakkaṭakassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 』什麼是那一支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, panthamakkaṭako panthe makkaṭajālavitānaṃ katvā yadi tattha jālake laggati kimi vā makkhikā vā paṭaṅgo vā, taṃ gahetvā bhakkhayati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena chasu dvāresu satipaṭṭhānajālavitānaṃ katvā yadi tattha kilesamakkhikā bajjhanti, tattheva ghātetabbā.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，在六門上作念住網幕後，如果在那裡污染蒼蠅們被捕捉，牠們應該就在那裡被殺掉。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, panthamakkaṭakassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是路上待獵物蜘蛛的一支應該被把握。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena anuruddhena–
chinese: 這也被阿那律上座說：

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Cittaṃ niyame chasu dvāresu, satipaṭṭhānavaruttame;
chinese: 『心在六門上能約制：在殊勝最上的念住上，

pali: Kilesā tattha laggā ce, hantabbā te vipassinā’’’ ti.
Panthamakkaṭakaṅgapañho paṭhamo.
chinese: 路上待獵物蜘蛛支的問題第一。

pali: 2 . Thanassitadārakaṅgapañho
chinese: 2.依乳兒支的問題 [目錄]

pali: 2.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ thanassitadārakassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti ?
chinese: 』什麼是那一支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, thanassitadārako sadatthe laggati, khīratthiko rodati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sadatthe laggitabbaṃ, sabbattha dhammañāṇena bhavitabbaṃ, uddese paripucchāya sammappayoge paviveke garusaṃvāse kalyāṇamittasevane.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被黏在自己的利益上，在一切處以法智、在說示上以遍問、在正確的努力上、在獨居上、在老師共住上、在善友親近上應該被成為。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, thanassitadārakassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena dīghanikāyavare parinibbānasuttante–
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在長部般涅槃經中說：

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Iṅghaṃ tumhe, ānanda, sāratthe[ sadatthe( sī. pī.)] ghaṭatha, sāratthe anuyuñjatha;
chinese: 你們應該在核心利益上努力，你們應該在核心利益上實踐，

pali: Sāratthe appamattā ātāpino pahitattā viharathā’’’ ti.
chinese: 你們應該在核心利益上住於不放逸的、熱心的、自我努力的。

pali: Thanassitadārakaṅgapañho dutiyo.
3 . Cittakadharakummaṅgapañho
3.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ cittakadharakummassa[ cittakathalakummassa( sī. pī.)] ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 』什麼是那一支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, cittakadharakummo udakabhayā udakaṃ parivajjetvā vicarati, tāya ca pana udakaṃ parivajjanāya āyunā na parihāyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena pamāde bhayadassāvinā bhavitabbaṃ, appamāde guṇavisesadassāvinā.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為在放逸上看見可怕者、在不放逸上看見差別(特質)者，而且以他看見可怕，他以沙門身分不損減，來到涅槃的面前。

pali: Tāya ca pana bhayadassāvitāya na parihāyati sāmaññā, nibbānassa santike upeti[ ṭhapeti( ka.)].
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, cittakadharakummassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena dhammapade–
chinese: 『樂於不放逸的比丘，或在放逸上看見可怕者，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Appamādarato bhikkhu, pamāde bhayadassi vā;
Abhabbo parihānāya, nibbānasseva santike’’’ ti.
Cittakadharakummaṅgapañho catuttho.
chinese: 陸斑龜支的問題第三。

pali: 4 . Pavanaṅgapañho
4.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ pavanassa pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 』什麼是那五支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, pavanaṃ nāma asucijanaṃ paṭicchādeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena paresaṃ aparaddhaṃ khalitaṃ paṭicchādetabbaṃ na vivaritabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, pavanassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, pavanaṃ suññaṃ pacurajanehi, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena rāgadosamohamānadiṭṭhijālehi sabbehi ca kilesehi suññena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, pavanassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, pavanaṃ vivittaṃ janasambādharahitaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi anariyehi pavivittena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是山邊的第三支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, pavanassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 山邊是寂靜的、遍純淨的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, pavanaṃ santaṃ parisuddhaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena santena parisuddhena bhavitabbaṃ, nibbutena pahīnamānena pahīnamakkhena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是山邊的第四支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, pavanassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 山邊是被聖人親近的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, pavanaṃ ariyajanasaṃsevitaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ariyajanasaṃsevitena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是山邊的第五支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, pavanassa pañcamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在殊勝相應部中說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena saṃyuttanikāyavare–
chinese: 『與獨住的聖者，與自我努力的禪修者，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Pavivittehi ariyehi, pahitattehi jhāyibhi;
chinese: 與活力常已被發動者，應該與賢智者共住。

pali: Niccaṃ āraddhavīriyehi, paṇḍitehi sahāvase’’’ ti.
chinese: 山邊支的問題第四。

pali: Pavanaṅgapañho catuttho.
chinese: 5.樹支的問題 [目錄]

pali: 5 . Rukkhaṅgapañho
chinese: 5.「那先大德！

pali: 5.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ rukkhassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, rukkho nāma pupphaphaladharo, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena vimuttipupphasāmaññaphaladhārinā bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, rukkhassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, rukkho upagatānamanuppaviṭṭhānaṃ janānaṃ chāyaṃ deti, evameva kho , mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena upagatānamanuppaviṭṭhānaṃ puggalānaṃ āmisappaṭisandhārena vā dhammappaṭisanthārena vā paṭisantharitabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, rukkhassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, rukkho chāyāvemattaṃ na karoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sabbasattesu vemattatā na kātabbā, coravadhakapaccatthikesupi attanipi samasamā mettābhāvanā kātabbā,‘ kinti ime sattā averā abyāpajjā[ abyāpajjhā( sī.)] anīghā sukhī attānaṃ parihareyyun’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, rukkhassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被法將舍利弗上座說：

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 『在殺害者提婆達多上，在盜賊鴦掘摩羅上，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Vadhake devadattamhi, core aṅgulimālake;
Dhanapāle rāhule ca, sabbattha samako munī’’’ ti.
chinese: 6.雨支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Rukkhaṅgapañho pañcamo.
chinese: 6.「那先大德！

pali: 6 . Meghaṅgapañho
6.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ meghassa pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni pañca aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, megho uppannaṃ rajojallaṃ vūpasameti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena uppannaṃ kilesarajojallaṃ vūpasametabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, meghassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, megho pathaviyā uṇhaṃ nibbāpeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena mettābhāvanāya sadevako loko nibbāpetabbo.
chinese: 雨使一切種子生長。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, meghassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, megho sabbabījāni viruhāpeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sabbasattānaṃ saddhaṃ uppādetvā taṃ saddhābījaṃ tīsu sampattīsu ropetabbaṃ, dibbamānusikāsu sukhasampattīsu yāvaparamatthanibbānasukhasampatti.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, meghassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 雨從時節等起後，保護在地面生長的草、木、藤、樹叢、藥草、大無花果樹。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, megho ututo samuṭṭhahitvā dharaṇitalaruhe tiṇarukkhalatāgumbaosadhivanappatayo parirakkhati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena yoniso manasikāraṃ nibbattetvā tena yoniso manasikārena samaṇadhammo parirakkhitabbo, yoniso manasikāramūlakā sabbe kusalā dhammā.
chinese: 當下雨時，以水之奔流使河、池塘、蓮花池，以及洞穴、裂縫、沼、坑、井充滿。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, meghassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.

‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ , mahārāja, megho vassamāno naditaḷākapokkharaṇiyo kandarapadarasarasobbhaudapānāni ca paripūreti udakadhārāhi, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena āgamapariyattiyā dhammameghamabhivassayitvā adhigamakāmānaṃ mānasaṃ paripūrayitabbaṃ.
chinese: 『看見人們能被覺醒後，即使在十萬由旬處，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, meghassa pañcamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 7.寶珠支的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Bodhaneyyaṃ janaṃ disvā, satasahassepi yojane;
chinese: 凡你說：『寶珠的三支應該被把握。

pali: Khaṇena upagantvāna, bodheti taṃ mahāmunī’’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Meghaṅgapañho chaṭṭho.
chinese: 如寶珠是一向遍純淨的。

pali: 7 . Maṇiratanaṅgapañho
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: 7.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ maṇiratanassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 這是寶珠的第一支應該被把握。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, maṇiratanaṃ ekantaparisuddhaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ekantaparisuddhājīvena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他不應該被惡的惡同伴一起混合。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, maṇiratanassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是寶珠的第二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, maṇiratanaṃ na kenaci saddhiṃ missīyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena pāpehi pāpasahāyehi saddhiṃ na missitabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, maṇiratanassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他應該被與最上殊聖高貴的賢者一起共住：向道者、果住立者、有學、果具足者，應該被與須陀洹、斯陀含、阿那含、阿羅漢一起共住。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, maṇiratanaṃ jātiratanehi yojīyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena uttamavarajātimantehi saddhiṃ saṃvasitabbaṃ, paṭipannakaphalaṭṭhasekkhaphalasamaṅgīhi sotāpannasakadāgāmianāgāmiarahantatevijjachaḷabhiññasamaṇamaṇiratanehi saddhiṃ saṃvasitabbaṃ.
chinese: 之後明智者們，你們將一致地作苦的終結。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, maṇiratanassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 寶珠支的問題第七。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena suttanipāte–
chinese: 8.「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Suddhā suddhehi saṃvāsaṃ, kappayavho patissatā;
chinese: 凡你說：『獵人的四支應該被把握。

pali: Tato samaggā nipakā, dukkhassantaṃ karissathā’’’ ti.
chinese: 如獵人是少睡眠的。

pali: Maṇiratanapañho sattamo.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: 8 . Māgavikaṅgapañho
8.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ māgavikassa cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 獵人心只緊繫在野獸上。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, māgaviko appamiddho hoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena appamiddhena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, māgavikassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 獵人知道工作的適當時間。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, māgaviko migesu yeva cittaṃ upanibandhati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ārammaṇesu yeva cittaṃ upanibandhitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，獨坐的適當時間應該被知道：『這是獨坐的適當時間，這是出去的適當時間。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, māgavikassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是獵人的第三支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, māgaviko kālaṃ kammassa jānāti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena paṭisallānassa kālo jānitabbo‘ ayaṃ kālo paṭisallānassa, ayaṃ kālo nikkhamanāyā’ ti.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，在所緣上應該被大喜樂，應該使歡笑被生起：『我將證得更上的差別(特質)。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, māgavikassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 』大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, māgaviko migaṃ disvā hāsamabhijaneti‘ imaṃ lacchāmī’ ti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ārammaṇe abhiramitabbaṃ, hāsamabhijanetabbaṃ‘ uttariṃ visesamadhigacchissāmī’ ti.
Idaṃ, mahārāja, māgavikassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 9.漁夫支的問題 [目錄]

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ mahārāja therena mogharājena–
chinese: 凡你說：『漁夫的二支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Ārammaṇe labhitvāna, pahitattena bhikkhunā;
chinese: 』什麼是那二支應該被把握呢？

pali: Bhiyyo hāso janetabbo, adhigacchissāmi uttarin’’’ ti.
chinese: 如漁夫以釣鉤拉出魚。

pali: Māgavikaṅgapañho aṭṭhamo.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: 9 . Bāḷisikaṅgapañho
9.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ bāḷisikassa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, bāḷisiko baḷisena macche uddharati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena ñāṇena uttariṃ sāmaññaphalāni uddharitabbāni.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, bāḷisikassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, bāḷisiko parittakaṃ vadhitvā vipulaṃ lābhamadhigacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena parittalokāmisamattaṃ pariccajitabbaṃ.
Lokāmisamattaṃ, mahārāja, pariccajitvā yogī yogāvacaro vipulaṃ sāmaññaphalaṃ adhigacchati.
chinese: 10.「那先大德！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, bāḷisikassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 凡你說：『木匠的二支應該被把握。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena rāhulena–
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Suññatañcānimittañca, vimokkhañcāppaṇihitaṃ;
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Caturo phale chaḷabhiññā, cajitvā lokāmisaṃ labhe’’’ ti.
Bāḷisikaṅgapañho navamo.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他按照勝者之教後，住立在戒之地後，以信之手拿起慧之劍後，污染應該被切。

pali: 10 . Tacchakaṅgapañho
10.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ tacchakassa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 木匠除去膚材後，拿取心材。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, tacchako kāḷasuttaṃ anulometvā rukkhaṃ tacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena jinasāsanamanulomayitvā sīlapathaviyaṃ patiṭṭhahitvā saddhāhatthena paññāvāsiṃ gahetvā kilesā tacchetabbā.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, tacchakassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，常恆、斷滅、命即是身體、命是一身體是另一、那是最上的、另一個是最上的、無所作是不可能、無人之作為、無梵行生活、眾生滅亡新眾生出現、諸行常恆性、作者即是感受[結果]者、作者是一感受[結果]者是另一、業果的看見與所作有果之見：除去如此這樣及其它諸諍路後，最上空之諸行的本質(自性)應該被拿取：無眾生的(柬埔寨版)無生命的、究竟空的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, tacchako phegguṃ apaharitvā sāramādiyati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sassataṃ ucchedaṃ taṃ jīvaṃ taṃ sarīraṃ aññaṃ jīvaṃ aññaṃ sarīraṃ taduttamaṃ aññaduttamaṃ akatamabhabbaṃ apurisakāraṃ abrahmacariyavāsaṃ sattavināsaṃ navasattapātubhāvaṃ saṅkhārasassatabhāvaṃ yo karoti, so paṭisaṃvedeti, añño karoti, añño paṭisaṃvedeti, kammaphaladassanā ca kiriyaphaladiṭṭhi ca iti evarūpāni ceva aññāni ca vivādapathāni apanetvā saṅkhārānaṃ sabhāvaṃ paramasuññataṃ nirīhanijjīvataṃ[ nisattanijīvataṃ( ka.)] accantaṃ suññataṃ ādiyitabbaṃ.
chinese: 純淨者們與純淨者們，請您們朝向念地作共住，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, tacchakassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 之後明智者們，你們將一致地作苦的終結。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena suttanipāte–
‘ ‘‘ Kāraṇḍavaṃ niddhamatha, kasambuṃ apakassatha;
chinese: 其攝頌：

pali: Tato palāpe vāhetha, assamaṇe samaṇamānine.
chinese: 「蜘蛛、兒童、陸龜，山林與樹為第五的，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Niddhamitvāna pāpicche, pāpaācāragocare;
chinese: 雲、寶珠、獵人，漁夫與木匠。

pali: Suddhā suddhehi saṃvāsaṃ, kappayavho patissatā;
Tato samaggā nipakā, dukkhassantaṃ karissathā’’’ ti.
Tacchakaṅgapañho dasamo.
Makkaṭakavaggo chaṭṭho.
Tassuddānaṃ –
Makkaṭo dārako kummo, vanaṃ rukkho ca pañcamo;
Megho maṇi māgaviko, bāḷisī tacchakena cāti.
7 . Kumbhavaggo
chinese: 7.水瓶品 [目錄]

pali: 1 . Kumbhaṅgapañho
1.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ kumbhassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamaṃ taṃ ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 』什麼是那一支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, kumbho sampuṇṇo na saṇati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena āgame adhigame pariyattiyaṃ sāmaññe pāramiṃ patvā na saṇitabbaṃ, na tena māno karaṇīyo, na dabbo[ dappo( sī.)] dassetabbo, nihatamānena nihatadabbena bhavitabbaṃ, ujukena amukharena avikatthinā.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，在阿含之證得、通達時，在沙門位上之完成到達後，不應該被出聲，慢不應該因為那樣被產生(作)，有價值不應該被展現，應該被成為已破慢者，應該被成為已破有價值者、正直者、不多言者、不自誇者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, kumbhassa ekaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena suttanipāte–
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天在經集中說：

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Yadūnakaṃ taṃ saṇati, yaṃ pūraṃ santameva taṃ;
Aḍḍhakumbhūpamo [ rittakumbhūpamo( sī.)] bālo, rahado pūrova paṇḍito’’’ ti.
chinese: 愚者如半瓶，賢智者如充滿的湖。

pali: Kumbhaṅgapañho paṭhamo.
2 . Kāḷāyasaṅgapañho
2.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ kāḷāyasassa[ kāḷahaṃsassa( ka.)] dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti ?
chinese: 』什麼是那二支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, kāḷāyaso supīto[ suthito( ka.)] vamati[ vahati( syā. ka.)], evameva kho, mahārāja, yogino yogāvacarassa mānasaṃ yoniso manasikārena[ yoniso manasikāre( sī. syā. ka.)] apītaṃ vamati.
chinese: 一次浸泡的黑鐵不吐出水。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, kāḷāyasassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, kāḷāyaso sakiṃ pītaṃ udakaṃ na vamati, evameva kho, mahārāja , yoginā yogāvacarena yo sakiṃ uppanno pasādo, na puna so vamitabbo‘ uḷāro so bhagavā sammāsambuddho, svākkhāto dhammo, suppaṭipanno saṅgho’ ti.
chinese: 』凡一次生起的智，它不應該再被吐出：『色是無常的，受是無常的，想是無常的，諸行是無常的，識是無常的。

pali: ‘ Rūpaṃ aniccaṃ, vedanā aniccā, saññā aniccā, saṅkhārā aniccā, viññāṇaṃ aniccanti yaṃ sakiṃ uppannaṃ ñāṇaṃ, na puna taṃ vamitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天說：

pali: Idaṃ , mahārāja, kāḷāyasassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 『被淨化的人在看見時，在聖法上決定者是到達差別者，

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena–
chinese: 他不只一個部分不畏懼，而是他完全就成為頂點者。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Dassanamhi parisodhito[ parisodhike( sī. ka.)] naro, ariyadhamme niyato visesagū;
chinese: 3.「那先大德！

pali: Nappavedhati anekabhāgaso, sabbaso ca mukhabhāvameva so’’’ ti.
chinese: 』什麼是那三支應該被把握呢？

pali: Kāḷāyasaṅgapañho dutiyo.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: 3 . Chattaṅgapañho
chinese: 如傘在頭上方行。

pali: 3.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ chattassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 這是傘的第一支應該被把握。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, chattaṃ upari muddhani carati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena kilesānaṃ upari muddhani carena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, chattassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, chattaṃ muddhanupatthambhaṃ hoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena yoniso manasikārupatthambhena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，個個沙門婆羅門種種見的所思風、三種火的折磨、污染雨應該被防止。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, chattassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這是傘的第三支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, chattaṃ vātātapameghavuṭṭhiyo paṭihanati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena nānāvidhadiṭṭhiputhusamaṇabrāhmaṇānaṃ[ mahāvāta( ka.)] matavātatividhaggisantāpakilesavuṭṭhiyo paṭihantabbā .
chinese: 傘支的問題第三。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, chattassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 4.「那先大德！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 』什麼是那三支應該被把握呢？

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Yathāpi chattaṃ vipulaṃ, acchiddaṃ thirasaṃhitaṃ;
chinese: 如田是水路具足者。

pali: Vātātapaṃ nivāreti, mahatī meghavuṭṭhiyo.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Tatheva buddhaputtopi, sīlachattadharo suci;
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，應該被成為善行、返回本分的水路具足者。

pali: Kilesavuṭṭhiṃ vāreti, santāpatividhaggayo’’’ ti.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Chattaṅgapañho tatiyo.
4 . Khettaṅgapañho
chinese: 田是界限具足者，而守護那個界限中的水後，使穀物成熟。

pali: 4.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ khettassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, khettaṃ mātikāsampannaṃ hoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sucaritavattappaṭivattamātikāsampannena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, khettassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 田是生成具足者、農夫的歡笑產生者：即使少量種子被播種也有許多的(收成)，許多的被播種有更多的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, khettaṃ mariyādāsampannaṃ hoti, tāya ca mariyādāya udakaṃ rakkhitvā dhaññaṃ paripāceti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sīlahirimariyādāsampannena bhavitabbaṃ, tāya ca sīlahirimariyādāya sāmaññaṃ rakkhitvā cattāri sāmaññaphalāni gahetabbāni.
chinese: 這是田的第三支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, khettassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被持律者優波離上座說：

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, khettaṃ uṭṭhānasampannaṃ hoti, kassakassa hāsajanakaṃ appampi bījaṃ vuttaṃ bahu hoti, bahu vuttaṃ bahutaraṃ hoti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena uṭṭhānasampannena vipulaphaladāyinā bhavitabbaṃ, dāyakānaṃ hāsajanakena bhavitabbaṃ, yathā appaṃ dinnaṃ bahu hoti, bahu dinnaṃ bahutaraṃ hoti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, khettassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，污染不應該被住立在心意上。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena upālinā vinayadharena–
chinese: 這是解毒劑的第一支應該被把握。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Khettūpamena bhavitabbaṃ, uṭṭhānavipuladāyinā;
chinese: 解毒劑擊退咬的、觸的、加毒的、吃的、喝的、嚼的、嘗的一切毒。

pali: Esa khettavaro nāma, yo dadāti vipulaṃ phalan’’’ ti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Khettaṅgapañho catuttho.
5 . Agadaṅgapañho
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，貪瞋癡慢見之毒一切應該被擊退。

pali: 5.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ agadassa dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni dve aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti.
chinese: 這也被世尊、天中天說：

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, agade kimī na saṇṭhahanti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena mānase kilesā na saṇṭhapetabbā.
chinese: 解毒劑支的問題第五。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, agadassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 6.「那先大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, agado daṭṭhaphuṭṭhadiṭṭhaasitapītakhāyitasāyitaṃ sabbaṃ visaṃ paṭihanati, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena rāgadosamohamānadiṭṭhivisaṃ sabbaṃ paṭihanitabbaṃ.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他應該被成為一切眾生的道之支持者。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, agadassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā devātidevena–
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Saṅkhārānaṃ sabhāvatthaṃ, daṭṭhukāmena yoginā;
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Agadeneva hotabbaṃ, kilesavisanāsane’’’ ti.
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，福德之增大應該被增大。

pali: Agadaṅgapañho pañcamo.
chinese: 大王！

pali: 6 . Bhojanaṅgapañho
chinese: 這是食物的第二支應該被把握。

pali: 6.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ bhojanassa tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni tīṇi aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他應該被成為一切世間之希求者。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, bhojanaṃ sabbasattānaṃ upatthambho, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sabbasattānaṃ maggupatthambhena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 『以抑制以約制，以戒以行道，

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, bhojanassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, bhojanaṃ sabbasattānaṃ balaṃ vaḍḍheti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena puññavaḍḍhiyā vaḍḍhitabbaṃ.
chinese: 凡你說：『弓箭手的四支應該被把握。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, bhojanassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, bhojanaṃ sabbasattānaṃ abhipatthitaṃ, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sabbalokābhipatthitena bhavitabbaṃ.
chinese: 如當弓箭手射出箭時，使兩腳穩固地住立於地，膝蓋作無缺陷的，放置箭袋在腰關節處，身體作堅固的，使兩手關節處登上(準備好)，握緊拳，手指作無間隙的，伸展脖子，關閉眼與口，相(目標)作筆直的，使笑生起：『我將會貫穿。

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, bhojanassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena mahāmoggallānena–
‘ ‘‘ Saṃyamena niyamena, sīlena paṭipattiyā;
chinese: 』同樣的，大王！

pali: Patthitena bhavitabbaṃ, sabbalokassa yoginā’’’ ti.
Bhojanaṅgapañho chaṭṭho.
7 . Issāsaṅgapañho
7.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena,‘ issāsassa cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’ ti yaṃ vadesi, katamāni tāni cattāri aṅgāni gahetabbānī’’ ti?
chinese: 相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，他應該使活力之足被住立在戒之地上，忍耐柔和應該無缺陷地被建立(作)，心應該被住立在自制上，自己應該被導引到抑制、約制上，欲求、迷戀應該被握緊，心應該無間隙地(不斷地)被建立(作)在如理作意上，活力應該被伸展，六門應該被關閉，念應該被建立(現前)，應該使笑被生起：『我將會以智的鐵箭貫穿一切污染。

pali: ‘‘ Yathā, mahārāja, issāso sare pātayanto ubho pāde pathaviyaṃ daḷhaṃ patiṭṭhāpeti, jaṇṇuavekallaṃ karoti, sarakalāpaṃ kaṭisandhimhi ṭhapeti, kāyaṃ upatthaddhaṃ karoti, dve hatthe sandhiṭṭhānaṃ āropeti, muṭṭhiṃ pīḷayati, aṅguliyo nirantaraṃ karoti, gīvaṃ paggaṇhāti, cakkhūni mukhañca pidahati, nimittaṃ ujuṃ karoti, hāsamuppādeti‘ vijjhissāmī’ ti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sīlapathaviyaṃ vīriyapāde patiṭṭhāpetabbaṃ, khantisoraccaṃ avekallaṃ kātabbaṃ, saṃvare cittaṃ ṭhapetabbaṃ, saṃyamaniyame attā upanetabbo, icchā mucchā pīḷayitabbā, yoniso manasikāre cittaṃ nirantaraṃ kātabbaṃ, vīriyaṃ paggahetabbaṃ, cha dvārā pidahitabbā, sati upaṭṭhapetabbā, hāsamuppādetabbaṃ‘ sabbakilese ñāṇanārācena vijjhissāmī’ ti.
chinese: 怎樣是相較於瑜伽者、瑜伽行者，在這個身上應該使之被練習呢？

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, issāsassa paṭhamaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, issāso āḷakaṃ pariharati vaṅkajimhakuṭilanārācassa ujukaraṇāya.
Evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena imasmiṃ kāye satipaṭṭhānaāḷakaṃ pariharitabbaṃ vaṅkajimhakuṭilacittassa ujukaraṇāya.
Idaṃ, mahārāja, issāsassa dutiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, issāso lakkhe upāseti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena imasmiṃ kāye upāsitabbaṃ.
Kathaṃ mahārāja yoginā yogāvacarena imasmiṃ kāye upāsitabbaṃ?

Aniccato upāsitabbaṃ, dukkhato upāsitabbaṃ, anattato upāsitabbaṃ, rogato… pe… gaṇḍato… pe… sallato… pe… aghato… pe… ābādhato… pe… parato… pe… palokato… pe… ītito… pe… upaddavato… pe… bhayato… pe… upasaggato… pe… calato… pe… pabhaṅguto… pe… addhuvato… pe… atāṇato… pe… aleṇato… pe… asaraṇato… pe… rittato… pe… tucchato… pe… suññato… pe… ādīnavato… pe… vipariṇāmadhammato… pe… asārato … pe… aghamūlato… pe… vadhakato… pe… vibhavato… pe… sāsavato… pe… saṅkhatato… pe… mārāmisato… pe… jātidhammato… pe… jarādhammato… pe… byādhidhammato… pe… maraṇadhammato… pe… sokadhammato… pe… paridevadhammato… pe… upāyāsadhammato… pe… saṃkilesadhammato… pe… evaṃ kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena imasmiṃ kāye upāsitabbaṃ.
chinese: 再者，大王！

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, issāsassa tatiyaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ, mahārāja, issāso sāyaṃ pātaṃ upāsati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, yoginā yogāvacarena sāyaṃ pātaṃ ārammaṇe upāsitabbaṃ.
chinese: 這也被法將舍利弗上座說：

pali: Idaṃ, mahārāja, issāsassa catutthaṃ aṅgaṃ gahetabbaṃ.
chinese: 當不捨棄練習時，他得到食物與費用。

pali: Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena sāriputtena dhammasenāpatinā–
chinese: 佛子就在那裡也，作身的練習，

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Yathā issāsako nāma, sāyaṃ pātaṃ upāsati;
Upāsanaṃ ariñcanto[ na ricchanto( sī. ka.)], labhate bhattavetanaṃ.
chinese: 水瓶品第七。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Tatheva buddhaputtopi, karoti kāyupāsanaṃ;
chinese: [「從此之後，國王支的問題等三十八個問題已消失，看見那些後不能再被述說：在印刷時為了利益放入。

pali: Kāyupāsanaṃ ariñcanto, arahattamadhigacchatī’’’ ti.
Issāsaṅgapañho sattamo.
chinese: 其攝頌：

pali: Kumbhavaggo sattamo[ ito paraṃ rājaṅgapañhādikā aṭṭhatiṃsa pañhā vinaṭṭhā, yehi tā diṭṭhā,§ tehi no ārocetabbā puna muddāpanakāle pakkhipanatthāyāti( na, bu, sa)].
Tassuddānaṃ –
Kumbho ca kāḷāyaso ca, chattaṃ khettañca agado;
chinese: 比喻之談論的問題已終了。

pali: Bhojanena ca issāso, vuttaṃ dāni vidūhīti.
Opammakathāpañho niṭṭhito.
Nigamanaṃ
chinese: 結論

pali: Iti chasu kaṇḍesu bāvīsativaggapatimaṇḍitesu dvāsaṭṭhiadhikā dvesatā imasmiṃ potthake āgatā milindapañhā samattā, anāgatā ca pana dvācattālīsā honti, āgatā ca anāgatā ca sabbā samodhānetvā catūhi adhikā tisatapañhā honti, sabbāva milindapañhāti saṅkhaṃ gacchanti.
chinese: 但未到達的有四十二則，已到達的與未到達的全部合併後有三百零四則提問，就全部名為彌蘭王的提問。

pali: Rañño ca therassa ca pucchāvisajjanāvasāne caturāsītisatasahassayojanabahalā udakapariyantaṃ katvā ayaṃ mahāpathavī chadhā kampittha, vijjullatā nicchariṃsu, devatā dibbapupphavassaṃ pavassiṃsu, mahābrahmā sādhukāramadāsi, mahāsamuddakucchiyaṃ meghatthanitanigghoso viya mahāghoso ahosi, iti so milindo rājā ca orodhagaṇā ca sirasā añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā vandiṃsu.
chinese: 像這樣，彌蘭王與後宮眾合掌至頭鞠躬後禮敬。

pali: Milindo rājā ativiya pamuditahadayo sumathitamānahadayo buddhasāsane sāramatino ratanattaye sunikkaṅkho niggumbo nitthaddho hutvā therassa guṇesu pabbajjāsu paṭipadāiriyāpathesu ca ativiya pasanno vissattho nirālayo nihatamānatthambho uddhaṭadāṭho viya bhujagindo evamāha‘‘ sādhu, bhante nāgasena, buddhavisayo pañho tayā visajjito, imasmiṃ buddhasāsane ṭhapetvā dhammasenāpatiṃ sāriputtattheraṃ añño tayā sadiso pañhavisajjane natthi, khamatha, bhante nāgasena, mama accayaṃ, upāsakaṃ maṃ, bhante nāgasena, dhāretha ajjatagge pāṇupetaṃ saraṇaṃ gatan’’ ti.

Tadā rājā saha balakāyehi nāgasenattheraṃ payirupāsitvā milindaṃ nāma vihāraṃ kāretvā therassa niyyātetvā catūhi paccayehi nāgasenaṃ koṭisatehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṃ paricari, punapi therassa paññāya pasīditvā puttassa rajjaṃ niyyātetvā agārasmā anagāriyaṃ pabbajitvā vipassanaṃ vaḍḍhetvā arahattaṃ pāpuṇi, tena vuttaṃ–
chinese: 「在世間中被以慧稱讚：以正法的存續所作，

pali: ‘ ‘ Paññā pasatthā lokasmiṃ, katā saddhammaṭṭhitiyā;
chinese: 以慧殺疑惑後，賢智者們得到寂靜。

pali: Paññāya vimatiṃ hantvā, santiṃ papponti paṇḍitā.
chinese: 凡以慧在蘊上住立者，在那裡是念無欠缺者，

pali: Yasmiṃ khandhe ṭhitā paññā, sati tattha anūnakā;
chinese: 尊敬者、有差別者，第一者、最上者、無上者。

pali: Pūjā visesassādhāro, aggo seṭṭho[ so va( pī.)] anuttaro;
chinese: 因此賢智者之人，自己的利益之看見者，

pali: Tasmā hi paṇḍito poso, sampassaṃ hitamattano[ atthamattano( pī.)];
Paññavantaṃbhipūjeyya , cetiyaṃ viya sādaro’’ ti[ pūjiyanti( pī.) ito paraṃ tisso gāthāyo sī. pī. potthakesu natthi].
chinese: 由大上座使之寫後，如所聽聞的使之被善保存。

pali: Laṅkāyaṃ doṇinagare, vasatā doṇināminā;
chinese: 彌蘭王的提問與，那先的回答，

pali: Mahātherena lekhitvā, suṭṭhapitaṃ yathāsutaṃ;
chinese: 彌蘭確實是大慧者，那先是善賢智者。

pali: Milindarājapañho ca, nāgasenavisajjanaṃ;
chinese: 以這個福業，我從這裡到兜率天，

pali: Milindo hi mahāpañño, nāgaseno supaṇḍito;
chinese: 能看見在未來的彌勒，能聽聞最上的法。

pali: Iminā puññakammena, ito gacchāmi tussitaṃ;
Metteyyaṃnāgate passe, suṇeyyaṃ dhammamuttamanti.
chinese: 彌蘭的提問已終了。

pali: Milindapañho niṭṭhitoniṭṭhito
